Name: Dexiconn

Name: Vashi Integrated Solutions
Description:
Vashi Integrated Solutions (formerly known as Vashi Electricals Pvt. Ltd.) is a leading provider of world’s finest industrial electrical, automation, power transmission and energy optimisation products and solutions.

Founded in 1978, the company has continuously risen to new heights and emerge unparalleled in the industry. Today, Vashi Integrated Solutions is recognized as the largest Channel Partner of 25+ global brands with thousands of products under its giant canopy of offerings.

The wide range of solutions offered by the company comprise industrial automation solutions, MRO solutions, energy optimization solutions and solar solutions delivered through 40K+ top-notch industrial and commercial product supplies. The product portfolio includes but is not limited to switchgear, wiring devices, motors and geared motors, wires and cables, imported panels, pneumatics, bearings, string inverters, solar PV connectors, lighting products and industrial lubricants of world-class brands.

We deal in licensed and branded products such as Ferrari, BMW, Harman Kardon, JBL, GUESS, Viva Madrid, Elago, Porodo, Turtle Brand, Rav Power and Anker brands to name a few as we have an ever expanding and changing range of products in order to supply in-demand, new and innovative products to our trading partners.

في أوسكار للهواتف ذ م م نفتخر بكوننا في طليعة أعمال توزيع الملحقات في الشرق الأوسط. تأسست في عام 1999 في دبي كشركة عائلية صغيرة تمتلك موقعاً واحداً وتتميز الآن بالعديد من المواقع بما في ذلك المكاتب والمعارض والمخازن التي تلبي احتياجات النمو التي مرت على مر السنين. لقد كان مفتاح نمونا هو اتفاقيات التوزيع الحصرية المختلفة مع العلامات التجارية ذات السمعة الطيبة في صناعة الإكسسوارات مما يجعلنا موقعًا واحدًا لجميع احتياجات الإكسسوارات. نحن نتعامل في المنتجات المرخصة والعلامة التجارية مثل فيراري ، بي ام دبليو ، هارمان كاردون ، جي بي ال ، غيس ، فيفا مدريد ، ايللاغو ، بورودو ، تيرتل براند ، راف باور وانكر على سبيل المثال لا الحصر حيث لدينا مجموعة من المنتجات المتغيرة والمتغيرة من أجل توفير المنتجات الجديدة والمبتكرة حسب الطلب لشركائنا التجاريين.

Name: Sony Electronics Singapore
Description:
Sony’s purpose is simple. We aim to fill the world with emotion, through the power of creativity and technology. We want to be responsible for getting hearts racing, stirring ambition, and putting a smile on the faces of our customers. That challenge, combined with our spirit of innovation, motivates us to create groundbreaking technology, entertainment, and services for people worldwide. 

Our history as a global brand has been built around employees that all have a passion for touching peoples' lives, and pride in pushing beyond the status quo to produce truly extraordinary results.

We’re uniquely positioned because we operate in many different industries - from movies and music to video games and electronics. And, with offices around the globe, we benefit from a global workforce that learns and grows together through mutual respect. 

If you're ready to join a diverse team at an innovation-led company with the power to change lives, then we encourage you to read up on the different Sony group companies and check out our Life page. Then, get in touch, and together, let’s make the world say wow.

Name: Groupe SEB Ibérica
Description:
Groupe SEB
Fundada en 1857 en Selongey (Francia), Groupe SEB es la compañía líder mundial en pequeño electrodoméstico y menaje de cocina. Con un portfolio de más de 45 marcas icónicas —entre ellas Rowenta, Tefal, Moulinex, Krups, Lagostina, WMF y Emsa— estamos presentes en la vida diaria de millones de consumidores en más de 150 países.

Con más de 40.000 empleados en todo el mundo y unas ventas que superan los 8.000 millones de euros anuales, Groupe SEB se distingue por la fortaleza de sus marcas, la apuesta constante por la innovación, la expansión internacional y una visión de futuro sostenible.

A lo largo de sus 165 años de historia, la compañía se ha consolidado como un referente global, combinando tradición e innovación para transformar la vida cotidiana de miles de millones de consumidores. Nuestro crecimiento ha sido impulsado tanto por desarrollos tecnológicos pioneros como por la incorporación de marcas líderes a través de adquisiciones estratégicas.

Hoy, Groupe SEB es sinónimo de calidad, innovación y confianza, siendo el compañero ideal del hogar en todos los continentes.

Description:

شركة محمد عمر العيسائي للإلكترونيات (AEC) هي إحدى الشركات الرائدة في توزيع الإلكترونيات الاستهلاكية في المملكة العربية السعودية، وتمثل بفخر مجموعة متنوعة من العلامات التجارية العالمية المعروفة. ومنذ تأسيسنا في عام 1998، بنينا سمعة قوية في تقديم منتجات إلكترونية وأجهزة منزلية مبتكرة وعالية الجودة لعملائنا في مختلف أنحاء المملكة.

من خلال شبكة توزيع قوية، وحضور متنامي في قطاع التجزئة، وبصمة قوية في التجارة الإلكترونية WWW.AECKSA.COM ، تلتزم شركة العيسائي للإلكترونيات بتقديم قيمة متميزة وخدمة عالية المستوى وحلول تكنولوجية متقدمة تعزز من جودة الحياة اليومية.

نفخر بشراكتنا مع علامات تجارية عالمية مثل TCL، LG، Whirlpool, HOOVER، DREAME، VESTEL، ROWA وGALANZ، حيث نوفر مجموعة واسعة من المنتجات تشمل: أجهزة التلفاز، المكيفات، الأجهزة المنزلية الكبيرة، الأجهزة الصغيرة، الأجهزة الذكية، ومنتجات العناية الشخصية وغيرها.

Name: MAXTRON
Description:
MAXTRON est une entreprise marocaine indépendante spécialisée dans la fourniture, le contrôle, et les essais des équipements électriques de basse, moyenne, et haute tension (BT/HTA/HTB). L'entreprise se distingue par sa capacité à fournir des équipements dotés des dernières technologies de mesure et de diagnostic, y compris des caisses d'injection, des générateurs, et de nombreux matériels portables. La compétence et la disponibilité des spécialistes de MAXTRON, chargés des interventions, font de l'entreprise une référence dans ce domaine très particulier de prestations. L'expérience accumulée permet à MAXTRON de proposer une gamme d’appareils et d’accessoires de mesure de très haute qualité, adaptés aux besoins spécifiques de ses clients (MAXTRON).
MAXTRON propose également une vaste gamme de services, incluant la maintenance des postes haute tension (HTA et HTB), des essais électriques, l'installation et la maintenance de HTA et BT, ainsi que des solutions dans le domaine de l'énergie renouvelable et la qualité de l'énergie. Parmi les services spécifiques, on trouve le raccordement et la maintenance de postes HTA/BT, où l'entreprise assure depuis la planification et la conception jusqu'à la mise en service, garantissant ainsi la capacité, la performance, et la sécurité des installations. MAXTRON veille à choisir méticuleusement les équipements et à effectuer des travaux de construction de qualité pour un raccordement au réseau. L'engagement de MAXTRON envers la conformité aux normes et la maintenance continue garantit une opération fiable et sécurisée des installations (MAXTRON).
La maintenance des postes HTB-HTA chez MAXTRON est présentée comme un aspect crucial pour garantir la fiabilité et la continuité de la distribution de l'énergie électrique. L'entreprise offre des services de maintenance adaptés aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client, incluant des inspections et des tests complets, la maintenance corrective, et la maintenance préventive.

Name: Hisense Iberia
Description:
Hisense, fundada en 1969, es una multinacional líder en el desarrollo de alta tecnología. A lo largo de los años Hisense se  ha ganado el reconocimiento de socios y clientes, formando parte de la lista Top 10 de las mejores empresas de innovación tecnológica a nivel internacional.

Con un equipo internacional de 69.000 empleados, la compañía trabaja por hacer de Hisense una marca líder a nivel mundial, cuya misión es desarrollar innovaciones tecnológicas accesibles para todo el mundo y que ayuden a mejorar su calidad de vida.
Comercializa sus productos (Televisores, Smartphones, frigoríficos, congeladores, lavadoras y aire acondicionado) en más de 130 países, y dispone de filiales en Europa, América del Norte, Australia, África y el sudeste asiático. Además,  cuenta con más de 16 centros de producción y 11 centros de I+D en todo el mundo.

Hisense Iberia se fundó en España  en 2009 para penetrar en el mercado Español y Portugués y para expandir la marca por el sur de Europa. Actualmente se distribuyen los productos en las principales cadenas nacionales y regionales de la Península así como en Baleares y Canarias.

Hisense, dónde la innovación se encuentra con el valor.

- Kable i przewody elektryczne: Szeroki wybór kabli energetycznych, sygnalizacyjnych, telekomunikacyjnych i specjalistycznych.
- Osprzęt elektryczny: Gniazdka, wtyczki, wyłączniki, bezpieczniki oraz osprzęt do instalacji elektrycznych.
- Oświetlenie: Nowoczesne i energooszczędne rozwiązania oświetleniowe, w tym LED, lampy przemysłowe, oświetlenie zewnętrzne i wewnętrzne.
- Automatyka przemysłowa: Sterowniki PLC, czujniki, przekaźniki i inne komponenty automatyki przemysłowej.
- Narzędzia i akcesoria: Profesjonalne narzędzia elektryczne, sprzęt montażowy i akcesoria do prac instalacyjnych.

Naszym celem jest zapewnienie najwyższego poziomu obsługi klienta poprzez:

- Szeroki Asortyment: Posiadamy produkty od renomowanych producentów, gwarantując ich niezawodność i jakość.
- Kompetentna Obsługa: Nasz zespół składa się z doświadczonych specjalistów, gotowych doradzić i pomóc w doborze odpowiednich produktów.
- Szybka Dostawa: Dysponujemy rozbudowaną siecią logistyczną, dzięki której zapewniamy szybką i terminową dostawę zamówień.
- Atrakcyjne Warunki Współpracy: Oferujemy konkurencyjne ceny, elastyczne warunki płatności i programy lojalnościowe dla stałych klientów.

Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu oraz zaangażowaniu w rozwój nowoczesnych technologii, staliśmy się zaufanym partnerem dla wielu firm i instytucji w Polsce i za granicą. Dołącz do grona naszych zadowolonych klientów i partnerów biznesowych. Razem z nami, Twoje projekty elektryczne będą zawsze na najwyższym poziomie!

L'impegno e la professionalità acquisita negli anni ci hanno permesso di diventare un punto di riferimento per la clientela.
Nei nostri due punti vendita, trattiamo prodotti e soluzioni tecnologiche all'avanguardia nei campi dell’illuminazione LED, della videosorveglianza, dei sistemi antintrusione, degli impianti del digitale terrestre, satellitare, reti cablate e wireless, automazioni e domotica e dell’ amplificazione professionale.
Troverete anche una nuova area espositiva con le principali categorie merceologiche trattate oltre ad un area dedicata affinché il professionista possa incontrarsi con il suo cliente e potergli far visionare i prodotti prima dell’acquisto.
Anche per il futuro continueremo a seguire con un occhio di riguardo la nostra clientela nell’evolversi di un mercato sempre più frenetico con un attenzione particolare alla consulenza e all’assistenza.

Name: Elstar AB
Description:
Elstar AB är ett familjeföretag som har ägts av nuvarande ägare sen 1999. 
Moderbolaget Top Industri AB firar 80år 2024. Fokus är långsiktiga äganden med verksamheter som erbjuder produkter och tjänster med stor kunskap, högsta kvalitet och förstklassig service.

Elstar är en väloljad och effektiv organisation med korta beslutsled och snabba handlingar. I Örebro har vi kontor och stort lager av vårt fulla sortiment.

Elstar är och har under många år varit Sveriges ledande leverantör av elektriska handtorkar. Med vårt arv och vision vill vi fortsätta att förse den svenska marknaden med högkvalitativa varmluftstorkar. (Hand- och Hårtorkar) Det gör vi genom att tillsammans med våra leverantörer arbeta för att ta fram handtorkar som är miljövänliga, energieffektiva och hygieniska.

Vi har samarbetat med många av våra leverantörer under flera års tid för att kunna erbjuda en trygg och bra produkt. Hos oss har handtorkarna varit en fast del av sortimentet ända sedan 1940-talet. Med ca 80 års erfarenhet av handtorkar vågar vi påstå att vi besitter väldigt goda kunskaper och erfarenheter om våra produkter.

Kunskap, Kvalitet och Service är ledorden som vi strävar efter att uppfylla dagligen. Våra kunder ska känna sig trygga med att de får rätt kunskap, hög kvalitet och förstklassig service när de kontaktar oss.

Description:

Naast onze ervaren experts, werkt Venema met hoogwaardige technische producten

Als vaste distributeur van het topmerk Victron Energy bieden wij u de beste producten en specialistische kennis wanneer dat nodig is. Met meer dan 46 jaar ervaring geniet Victron Energy van een ongeëvenaarde reputatie op het gebied van technische innovatie, betrouwbaarheid en kwaliteit. Victron is wereldleider op het gebied van onafhankelijke elektrische energievoorziening. De producten zijn ontwikkeld voor de meest veeleisende situaties waar, zowel recreatief als commercieel, mee te maken krijgt. 

Naast Victron Energy hebben wij verschillende dealerschappen met bijvoorbeeld Pylontech, TAB Batteries, Discover Battery, Aces en Osculati. Ook kunnen onze klanten altijd gebruik maken van onze service afdeling, waar we uitgebreid advies, documentatie, projectbegeleiding en nauwkeurige berekeningen aanbieden. 

Waarom voor VenemaTech kiezen?
Service en begeleiding staat hoog bij VenemaTech naast de verkoop van producten bieden wij ook een uitgebreid advies, documentatie en nauwkeurige berekeningen voor energiesystemen in diverse sectoren. Ook bieden wij projectbegeleiding bij de inbouw van het systeem van A tot Z. Ook vinde

Description:
Tillquist Group AB is a quality focused distributor of technology components and systems, mainly in the energy storage, power, industrial automation and photonics industries. We offer both customized and standardized products and services within our product divisions: Motion Control, Photonics and Piezo Ceramics. All our partners and customers are among the top brands in their respective industries.

Name: Audio Klan
Description:
Audio Klan is a family owned company established in 1994. We started as a distributor with specialized showroom, located in the downtown of Warsaw. In the early days, the company was focused on import of hi-fi and high-end products.
Through the years, the portfolio of distributed brands and offered product categories has been consequently broadened to cover various types of solutions – from advanced stereo components, through home theater systems and multi-room solutions, up to personal quality audio. We also put great attention to cover various price segments - always offering the best performance and outstanding value for money. 
Now, Audio Klan represents significant part of Polish AV market – with strong distribution channels composed of electronics retailers, mass merchandisers and audio specialist stores – all around 500 points of sale which ensure us, that our customers can easily find our products wherever they live. 
On top of Polish market, Audio Klan has also started developing the international business. With exclusive distribution of some of the premium brands on the Central-Eastern Europe markets and going with worldwide distribution as well. 
Audio Klan has also successfully developed the retail part of the business with it’s own brand - Top Hi-Fi & Video Design. Nowadays, with 21 locations in 15 cities, its the largest chain of stores with audio, hi-fi and hi-end products in Poland. They are stocked with full range of distributed products and equipped with dedicated listening rooms and experts on-site. An important part of omnichannel experience is fulfilled with on-line platform tophifi.pl. 
Broad presence in distribution and retail channels with omnichannel approach gives us the unique opportunity to build highly tailored brand strategies. For each brand we can design the right channel with suitable approach, to reach the right target groups of customers. This applies not only to audio-video segment, but also general consumer electronics market.

Meie tegevus toetub kvaliteedijuhtimissüsteemile ISO 9001:2015 ja keskkonnajuhtimissüsteemile ISO 14001:2015, tagades kõrged standardid. 

Viru Elektrikaubandus - teie usaldusväärne partner energiavaldkonnas ja lahenduste leidja nr 1 Eestis!

Name: PULS France
Description:
Bienvenue chez PULS France – filiale du leader mondial des alimentations sur rail DIN.
PULS est un pionnier de la technologie des alimentations électriques industrielles. Nous développons des solutions de pointe qui définissent les normes de l'industrie.
Avec plus de 40 ans d'expérience dans le domaine des alimentations sur rail DIN, PULS excelle en tant que leader technologique et commercial avec ses gammes de produits tels que DIMENSION, PIANO et MiniLine. Notre engagement va plus loin ; nous explorons des solutions d'alimentation électrique au-delà des armoires de commande pour dépasser les attentes des clients.
En 2020, nous avons lancé FIEPOS, une alimentation électrique décentralisée avec des indices IP54, IP65/IP67, qui redéfinit l'alimentation électrique pour la construction d'usines modulaires. Récemment, nous avons acquis Wiferion, un pionnier de l'alimentation sans fil par induction, qui offre des opportunités intéressantes dans le domaine de la recharge des véhicules guidés autonomes et des robots mobiles. Notre objectif est d'élargir notre portefeuille de produits par le biais de notre nouvelle unité commerciale PULS Wireless.
Nous sommes fiers de notre fabrication respectueuse de l'environnement, qui met l'accent sur la qualité et l'efficacité. Avec des installations en Allemagne, à Chomutov (République Tchèque) et à Suzhou (Chine), nous sommes équipés pour servir nos clients dans le monde entier. Contactez-nous par le biais de notre site web et restez informé sur l'automatisation industrielle, les technologies pionnières d'alimentation électrique et l'avenir via nos canaux de médias sociaux.
Notre engagement en faveur de l'ingénierie électrique, du développement durable, de la réussite économique et d'un environnement de travail favorable anime notre équipe dévouée de plus de 1 700 employés. Depuis plus de 40 ans, ces principes ont fait de PULS une entreprise de taille moyenne qui a le sens de l'innovation

Description:
P2RO, established on March 17, 2006, is a leading provider of efficient and cost-effective solutions to power quality problems across various sectors including BPO, Commercial, Industrial, Medical, and Government facilities. The management team of P2RO brings decades of collective experience in the field of power protection, dating back to the late 1970s through their involvement with other companies. Having witnessed the evolution of the market firsthand, they leverage their expertise and insights to address contemporary power quality challenges through P2RO.

Key aspects of P2RO's business include:

1.	Comprehensive Solutions: P2RO offers holistic solutions tailored to address power quality issues specific to each industry sector it serves.

2.	Experienced Team: The company boasts a highly skilled team of engineers and technicians with a deep understanding of power systems and protection mechanisms.

3.	Cutting-edge Products: P2RO partners with leading manufacturers to offer state-of-the-art power protection products designed to meet the diverse needs of its clientele.

4.	Industry-wide Applications: P2RO's solutions cater to a broad spectrum of industries, ranging from BPOs and commercial establishments to industrial, medical, and government facilities.

5.	Exceptional After-sales Service: P2RO prioritizes customer satisfaction by providing ongoing support and maintenance services to ensure the continued reliability and performance of its power systems.

Overall, P2RO stands out as a trusted provider of reliable power solutions, backed by decades of industry experience and a commitment to excellence in both products and services.

Name: Robots 4 All
Description:
Mi pomažemo vlasnicima i operaterima velikih prostora da rade stabilnije, efikasnije i sa manje stresa – zamenjujući najteže operativne poslove pouzdanim robotskim rešenjima, bez komplikacija i dodatnog zapošljavanja! 

Ukoliko se bavite uslugama izdavanja i održavanja prostora, upravljate hotelima, restoranima i maloprodajnim objektima ili vodite službu ljudskih resursa svesni ste koliko je danas teško naći zaposlene.
 
Suočavate se sa stalnim izazovima poput:
- Nedostatka kvalifikovane radne snage 
- Kroz smenski rad, učestala odsustva, sezonske poslove i neplanirane odlaske - zaposlenih prinuđeni ste da imate “rezerve”. 
- Troškovi zapošljavanja i poslovanja se uvećavaju
- Neujednačenog kvaliteta obavljenog posla. 

Vaš novi kolega može biti baš robot!
 
Kompanija Robots 4 All Vam predstavlja najsavremenija rešenja iz oblasti robotike u uslužnim delatnostima, sa sledećim namenama: 
1. Kompletno profesionalno čišćenje podnih površina,  
2.  Dostava/Odnošenje porudžbina u restoranima,  
3.  Promocija proizvoda i usluga,  
4. Beskontaktna dostava i room-servis, 
5. Pametni transport robe unutar objekata.

Primenom robota u svom poslovanju možete ostvariti sledeće benefite: 
* Olakšano poslovanje u domenima primene,
* Standardizaciju i kontinuirano obavljanje posla (24/7/365),
* Zapošljavanje manjeg broja ljudi, 
* Smanjenje operativnih troškova,  
* Oduševljenje Vaših posetilaca,
>>> Konačno: manje brige i olakšanje. 

Roboti u našoj ponudi su proizvođača KeenOn robotics, koji je prisutan u preko 60 zemalja i 600 gradova na svetu. Sada se Beograd, Zagreb, Sarajevo, Dubrovnik, Rovinj, Novi Sad, Mostar, Banja Luka pridružuju tehnološki najnaprednijim sredinama u oblasti usluga. 
Robots 4 All pruža svojim klijentima zaokruženu uslugu, koja uključuje: preporuku adekvatnih modela i broja robota, isporuku, konfiguraciju i obuku zaposlenih za osnovno rukovanje, servis i zamenu potrošnih i rezervnih delova. 

Za više informacija pišite nam na: office@robots4all.ai.

We have come a long with our clients in these turbulent ages with the aim of enriching our spiritual life as long as material one.

In the coming era, we are expected to "produce new values not found in the past" and "provide value where it is most needed". To meet these challenges, we have to carry out crisscrossing production activities relating to manufacturing, including "all processes from market cultivation to distribution", e.g., provision of "places where values thrive". TOWA DENKI has built a system that responds to these needs and is putting it to in our daily activities.
We have taken a multi-pronged approach to tackle the "environmental issue", which is the keyword of our times. In order to implement proper environmental measures, TOWA DENKI, as a worldwide company, has acquired the ISO 14001:2015, JIS Q 14001:2015 certification. With this accomplishment, we have come to expand our field of businesses in the area of ecology related products.

Manufacturing, from "Zero" to "Ecology". TOWA DENKI has gone beyond the framework of a trading company and provided flexible ideas and proposals to meet all your needs.

Компании принадлежит торговая марка Keen Side (Keen Side Electronics или сокращённо KSE).

Мы занимаемся прямыми поставками (импортом), из Китая и других стран, электронных компонентов и последующей продажей электронных компонентов со своего склада конечным покупателям и торгующим компаниям. Наша компания ориентирована на оптовые продажи со склада и под заказ, а также развивает проектные продажи электронных компонентов. Мы нацелены на выстраивание долгосрочных отношений со своими партнёрами, как покупателями, так и поставщиками.

За долгие годы работы, у компании сложились хорошие деловые отношения со многими участниками рынка электронных компонентов в России и за рубежом. СЭлКом тесно сотрудничает с Белорусскими компаниями Белчип и Комполинк, с Российскими компаниями Чип и Дип, Элитан, Элсин и другими. Компания активно использует современные технологии обмена информацией с партнёрами. Мы обмениваемся информацией о товарах в наличии на складе с 18 компаниями дистрибуторами, в том числе и зарубежными. Мы используем электронный документооборот (ЭДО) во взаиморасчётах с нашими контрагентами.

Развивая продажи электронных компонентов на Российском рынке, мы стремимся предлагать нашим клиентам товары хорошего качества по доступной цене. По этой причине, мы нацелены на прямое сотрудничество с заводами производителями. На сегодняшний день у компании более 40 прямых договоров поставок с различными заводами и это число продолжает увеличиваться, так как мы постоянно расширяем наш ассортимент. Мы стремимся поставлять на Российский рынок современные и востребованные электронные компоненты.

KOVAS Ltd. – Your Trusted Lighting Partner and Innovator

Founded in 1991, KOVAS Ltd. is a premier Bulgarian trade company and official partner of Philips Lighting (Signify). With over a decade of dedicated project experience, our professional team specializes in large-scale lighting projects for commercial, public, and institutional clients. We focus heavily on LED lighting innovations, especially tailored for factory, public building, hotel, and municipal applications. Our expertise and strategic partnerships position us as a key player in advancing Bulgaria’s lighting infrastructure.

Partnerships and Representation

KOVAS proudly serves as the Bulgarian representative for Venture Lighting (USA), and we also feature brands like C LUCE (Italy) and NARVA (Germany). Our collaborations span various sectors, including retail, construction, installation, public administration, and project companies, offering opportunities for strategic partnerships that drive value and growth in accordance with the latest EU and net carbon zero directives.

Name: Instalight ApS
Description:
Lad dig inspirere
LED-belysning kan forvandle din hverdag. Udfold kreativiteten og lad dig inspirere. Besøg vores showroom i Roskilde og se de mange LED-muligheder med egne øjne. Eller lad dig inspirere af en af vores kreative kundecases. Det er kun fantasien, der sætter grænser.

Sæt kulør på hverdagen
Intelligent LED-belysning giver dig uanede muligheder. Med blot ét enkelt klik kan du ændre lysets farve og sætte stemningen ved at dæmpe ned eller skrue op for lysstyrken. Du kan nemt og bekvemt personliggøre og styre lyset fra din smartphone.

Smart belysning til erhverv
Instalight leverer og installerer intelligent belysning til erhverv. Optimér dit energiforbrug og styrk din grønne profil. Kontrollerbare LED-løsninger er også et effektivt redskab til at øge produktiviteten og medarbejdernes velvære i hverdagen.

Det rette lys sælger
Undgå at sætte dine varer i et dårligt lys. Giv dine kunder en forbedret kundeoplevelse med professionel butiksbelysning. Lys sælger. Derfor er det vigtigt, at du tænker lys ind i butiksindretningen. LED-belysning kaster lys over dine varer med øje for salg.

HOTEL & RESTAURATION
Skab uforglemmelige oplevelser
Lysdesignet er afgørende for atmosfæren på dit hotel, restaurant eller café, og atmosfæren er afgørende for den generelle kundeoplevelse. Giv dine gæster en uforglemmelig oplevelse med levende og inspirerende LED-belysning.

Styrk din grønne profil
LED er en energibesparende lyskilde sammenlignet med traditionelle glødepærer. Når du skifter til LED, sparer du energi og reducerer derved dine omkostninger. Styrk din grønne profil med intelligent LED-belysning fra Instalight.

Name: wiremistri- The House Wiring Company
Description:
WireMistri is a digital platform transforming how India plans and prices electrical wiring for homes and small projects. Instead of relying on rough, lump-sum quotes, WireMistri turns a home layout into an instant, itemised estimate that clearly shows wire lengths, material requirements, labour logic, and approximate costs aligned with Indian standards.

For homeowners, WireMistri removes the guesswork from wiring budgets and safety decisions during new construction or renovation. Users can understand what they are paying for, compare options more confidently, and have structured conversations with electricians and contractors instead of depending only on verbal promises.

For professionals—electricians, contractors, consultants—WireMistri works as a smart quoting companion that helps generate standardised, professional-looking estimates in minutes. This improves transparency with clients, builds trust, and saves time otherwise spent on manual calculations, spreadsheets, or back-and-forth negotiations.

The platform is built around India’s electrical reality: varying local labour rates, diverse project sizes, and strong emphasis on safety and compliance. WireMistri incorporates rule-based logic, BIS/IS/NEC-aligned thinking, and structured data so users can plan wiring that is both cost-aware and safety-conscious rather than purely price-driven.

Beyond estimation, WireMistri’s vision is to become the electrical backbone for residential projects by connecting users with learning resources, curated product recommendations, and trusted local pros. As the Indian housing and renovation market grows, WireMistri aims to be the default starting point for anyone asking a simple question: “What will my wiring really cost, and is it being done right?

Name: NANOZ
Description:
Nanoz has developed a gas sensor for an Ozone sensor IOT, our ambition is to become an innovative leader in MOx and Opto sensors with a range of innovative patented products based on breakthrough technologies. We focus on pre-manufacturing and developing a range of innovative gas sensors. We have developed a global patent for selective gas detection sensors (MOx on Silicon).
Since 2012, CNRS/IM2NP researchers and Nanoz teams have been collaborating to make a cost-effective gas sensor for widespread use that is accurate, does not consume much energy and is compact enough to be easily interfaced with industrial processes, health and safety, and environmental systems with and without wireless or other communication interfaces.

The advantages of metal oxide semiconductor sensors are that they are highly sensitivity, are tolerant of humidity and temperature, last a long time and have relatively low manufacturing costs. The detection range (PPB Levels) of our sensor is 4 times greater than other sensors, despite being one of the smallest models on the market (only 1.15 mm long, 1.15 mm wide and 0.45 mm deep). It only consumes a tenth of the energy compared to its counterparts. We also ensure that our sensors can be selective. Our gas sensor can measure the target gas concentration among a mix of other gases; a selective sensor will give you the exact target gas concentration no matter what other gases are in the area.

Can you imagine the endless possibilities?
> Air quality  INDOOR AND OUTDOOR: Measure the quality of the air wherever you are.
> INDUSTRIES: Be on the safe side of industry.
> AUTOMOTIVE, AEROSPACE, TRANSPORTION: Reduce vehicle and engine pollution.
> CONNECTED DEVICES: Measure gasses with any device in any surroundings.
>MEDICARE: Measure gasses from the human body.

Name: Amperise Batteries
Description:
Amperise batteries levert thuisbatterijen, powerbank aanhangers en batterijcontainers. Naast het leveren van energieopslag, elektrificeren wij ook boten. Benieuwd wij wat voor jou kunnen betekenen? Neem gerust contact op.

We zitten midden in een energietransitie. We zullen met z’n allen minder energie moeten gaan gebruiken en de energie die we gebruiken zullen we op een verantwoorde manier moeten opwekken. Daarbij komt ook nog eens de explosie van energieprijzen door de oorlog in Oekraïne. 

Gelukkig zijn we in Nederland goed bezig want in 2022 zijn al ruim 1.500.000 woningen voorzien van zonnepanelen. Dit is natuurlijk geweldig alleen lopen we wel tegen een aantal beperkingen aan. Door de plaatsing van zonnepanelen, warmtepompen, elektrische verwarmingen en elektrische auto’s loopt het elektriciteitsnet tegen haar grenzen aan en komt het regelmatig voor dat de opgewekte zonne-energie niet terug te leveren is. Daar komt nog eens bij dat veel grote energieleverancier de prijzen voor het terug leveren van energie fors hebben teruggedraaid.
 
Gevolg is dat zonnepanelen overdag voor een schijntje energie terug leveren aan het net en in de avond voor hoge prijzen energie teruggekocht moet worden. Daarbij komt ook nog eens dat de meeste huishoudens overdag bijna geen stroom verbruiken omdat men overdag aan het werk is en pas in de avond stroom gaan verbruiken voor koken, verlichting, tv kijken, verwarmen, etc. Hoe mooi zou het zijn als je de energie die je opwekt thuis op kan slaan voor eigen gebruik.

Amperise Home Batteries heeft hier een betaalbare oplossing voor. 
Met de ervaringen die we hebben opgedaan met ons zusterbedrijf Amperaboats op het gebied van elektrisch varen we krachtige en betaalbare Lithium Ijzerfosfaat thuisbatterijen ontwikkeld die aan te sluiten zijn op bestaande zonnepanelen.

Name: Garberiel
Description:
Garberiel Brand Story

Garberiel Vision
At Garberiel, we take pride in being a professional outdoor gear manufacturer for flashlights, headlamps, laser pointers, batteries and the like. Whether you're looking for quality, durable and practical flashlights, headlamps or any other professional outdoor gear, we’ve got the best selection at the best prices.

Where We Begin
We founded Garberiel in 2009 based on a simple idea - Never Get Caught in the Dark. The founder Ellie, who once lived in a poor village when she was young, had had to go through a winding and bumpy path with a flashlight to get home from school where foxes or something horrible would appear, scaring her out of wits. At that very moments, her mother’s wisdom always encouraged her that the light will lead us home, dispersing the dark surrounding us! Even raising two boys alone with a hard life now, she has never been beaten down and lost her faith.
		
Outdoor adventure after darkness will result in many accidents, and light will effectively keep you from those dangers. We also believe light is as important as hope acting in a despairing situation when you are surrounded by darkness in any condition. That’s why Ellie founded Garberiel: to provide the world with professional lighting products including flashlights and headlamps that exceed the industry standards in performance, quality, user-safety and value, people in need, at such outdoor activities as camping, hiking, fishing, hunting, will get help from light or even saved by light.
Over the last fourteen years, we've been growing our business, and earning loyal customers not just in Canton - but all throughout the nation. Our business has continued to grow with a plan to go global, and expanding production lines with no “middle man” for high-profit margins has allowed us to keep our prices low.

Our partners are some of the world’s leading and most innovative companies in the field of T&M, including NI (part of Emerson), OPAL-RT, Spirent, Viavi, TMYTEK and Quanser. With direct presence in 11 countries, we are serving 87 countries across Europe, the Middle East and Africa.

Our corporate customers design, test and manufacture products for applications in automotive, aerospace, defence, electronics, semiconductor, telecommunications, industrial automation, energy, rail, maritime, environmental, water, agriculture, mining, smart cities, and healthcare.

Our academic and research customers use our solutions for their research projects and teaching labs in the fields of electrical, mechanical, aerospace, civil and biomedical engineering, mechatronics, and physics.

Description:
Exepart Electronics Inc. is a distinguished Canadian electronics company specializing in provision of effective solutions in trade of active and passive electronic components. 

Exepart has developed the World's most prestigious, cutting-edge platform, www.exepart.com, designed to serve as an ideal solution to buy and sell stocks globally and securely. 

Through our closed platform, all companies are approved into the system after documentation checks and members have the opportunity to sell to fellow members. They are able to explore stock offerings from various locations, industries, manufacturers and brokers around the World, and initiate purchase requests. 

In Exepart platform, buyers are secured via escrow and mandatory authentication testing, where sellers are secured from arbitrary sales cancellations as long as their parts are new and original. 

Names of manufacturers will be kept private in consideration of market competition. 

Company information of Brokers will be visible to members along with their performance statistics to indicate a broker's capacity to deliver on-time, generate revenue and provide authenticated parts. 

Prestigious Exepart badges will be earned by high performing Brokers. Let your statistics in provision of new and original components talk for you everywhere you do business!

Name: VDL TBP Electronics
Description:
VDL TBP Electronics (part of VDL Groep) is an electronics manufacturing services (EMS) company and offers integrated services in the field of printed circuit board assemblies (pcba’s). Clients benefit from the highest product value and the best value of ownership. This has been realised via design optimisation when it comes to manufacturability, testability, delivery flexibility and costs, and has resulted in maximum production efficiency and maximum quality. 

We are involved in the earliest design phase and our effectiveness can be attributed to our early supplier involvement, Design for eXcellence (DfX), Design for Manufacturing (DfM), Design for Testing (DfT), Design for Logistics (DfL) and Design for Cost (DfC). We are also a specialist in logistic services, smart industry, test engineering, box building and cabinet construction. 

We employee over 170 people and have experience since 1976 in a variety of sectors: energy & industry, science & health, semicon & analytics, vision, security & space. This means we possess all necessary certificates with regards to quality, process control, the environment, the medical sector and the aviation and aerospace industry. The VDL TBP Electronics head office is located at Goeree-Overflakkee in Dirksland, the Netherlands.

Name: ITE Group
Description:

With a professional specialized staff in management, engineering and designing as well as implementation it was made possible to expand the activity to design and put in place installation of internal networks of electric energy and of phone networks in housing settlements. 

Such an experience led to implementation of complex projects of systems of electric energy for industrial and commercial settlements. Networks for fire safety, internal telephone control centers, computer networks including rack and all other accessories, security and surveillance networks CCTV, BMS, audio phonic and conferences related networks were added gradually as core business of the company. 

All above-mentioned activities are being provided logistically with materials and equipment’s of the highest quality from international partners, producers such as Schnider Electric, General Electric, Bosch, Vimar, Fanton, Femi Cz, OMS Lighting,  etc.

You can count on Sunshine Lighting to have what you need in stock. Our 100,000 square foot warehouse is fully automated, and we offer you an advanced “pick, pack and ship” system for your convenience. When you choose Sunshine Lighting, you can count on our personal commitment to meet your lighting needs in a timely manner.

Name: Kaczmarek Electric Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Witamy na oficjalnej stronie Kaczmarek Electric Sp. z o.o. na LinkedIn. Jesteśmy ogólnopolską siecią hurtowni elektrotechnicznych i elektromarketów, którą w 1997 roku założyli Urszula i Cezary Kaczmarkowie. Dzięki sieci blisko 100 oddziałów, usytuowanych zarówno w dużych miastach jak i małych ośrodkach w całym kraju,  jesteśmy zawsze blisko klienta.

Firma stale rośnie i doskonali się dzięki zaangażowaniu ludzi, którzy pracują z prawdziwą pasją. Dzięki klientom i partnerom, którzy obdarzyli nas zaufaniem i rozwijają się razem z nami. Pracuje z nami 365 wykwalifikowanych handlowców.

Sercem naszej firmy jest Centrum Logistyczne w Powodowie, z magazynem o powierzchni 12 000 m2  i placem kablowym liczącym 21 100 m2.  Obsługuje ono klientów 6 dni w tygodniu przez 24 godziny na dobę.

Działamy na terenie całego kraju w branży energetycznej, telekomunikacyjnej i automatyki przemysłowej. Obsługujemy klientów z sektora przemysłowego, energetycznego oraz budowlanego, a także klientów indywidualnych. Nasz dział informacji technicznej przekazuje nowości, doradza i projektuje, a także prowadzi bezpłatne szkolenia.

Partnerstwo, pasja i profesjonalizm to wartości, w oparciu o które rozwijaliśmy naszą firmę od początku. Zawsze stawialiśmy przede wszystkim na ludzi, traktując z szacunkiem i przyjaźnie naszych klientów, dostawców i pracowników.  Dzięki temu Kaczmarek Electric ma opinię przedsiębiorstwa, z którym dobrze robi się interesy.

Mamy jedyny w swoim rodzaju, wypracowany przez lata, model sprzedaży, który umożliwia generowanie lepszych wyników. Zapraszamy do współpracy ludzi z pasją. Wspólnie te nasze pasje rozwijamy. Oferujemy rodzinną atmosferę, profesjonalne wsparcie i prawdziwe partnerstwo w biznesie.

Name: Heisener Electronics Limited
Description:
Heisener Electronics Limited, established in 2014, has grown quickly and stood out as a prominent supplier in electronic components distribution. It is both ISO9001 and ISO14001 certified, as a D-U-N-S Registered Company. 

Heisener is committed to supplying every customer with authentic and traceable components directly from the original manufacturers, authorized distributors and channels, including Broadcom, Xilinx, Texas Instruments, NXP, Silicon Labs, TDK, STMicroelectronics, Renesas, Microchip, Infineon, ADI, Avago, EPSON, Sumsung, Micron, Toshiba, Intel, Analog Devices, Panasonic, Rohm, Nichicon, Altera, Mouser, Digi-Key, and more.

Our expert QC team inspects and tests components in strict accordance with IDEA-STD-1010 standards to ensure the delivery of 100% genuine electronic parts. We partner with some best-in-class testing facilities like CXO Labs that deliver quality testing to mitigate counterfeits and reduce the risk of failure. 

From ICs, sensors, capacitors, to switches, MCU, and power supplies, Heisener has been a trusted source of electronic components for many industries including automotive, telecommunications, robotics, automation, industrial, medical, green energy, computing, remote control, data center applications, IoT, transportation, etc. 

To better serve clients all over the world with in-stock parts, Heisener implements an automated process control system, an experienced management team, and advanced inventory management technology. 

Global service starts here.
Consider us your go-to resource!

WhatsApp: +86 13726005073
Website: https://www.heisener.com/?source=sns

Name: Codelocks
Description:
Codelocks designs and distributes a wide portfolio of innovative, standalone keyless door locks and access products for a range of growing markets. Our products include stylish push-button mechanical locks, digital electronic locks, KitLock locker locks and smart solutions, which are easy for users to manage and operate using a keypad, card and smartphone. Convenience is at the heart of all our products.

Innovative technology plays an increasingly important role in enabling smart lock features. Codelocks NetCode is the smart way to generate time-sensitive codes which can allow temporary access. Our product innovation is bringing the convenience of access control to new markets, such as short-stay rental property, leisure facilities, music studios, schools and colleges, as well as traditional office buildings.

KitLock by Codelocks is a convenient and stylish alternative to traditional key-operated locker locks. Cabinets and lockers in any setting, including gyms, leisure centres, schools, hospitals, data centres and offices can be opened using a keypad code, eliminating the inconvenience of coins and keys.

Our products are cost-effective, easy to fit and programme, suitable for new installs and retrofits. We offer full access to expert technical advice and customer support and our products are available through a number of channels including direct web sales, locksmiths, installers, major resellers and OEMs.

We are a global business with our UK headquarters in Newbury, Berkshire. Products are widely available for both commercial and domestic use. We have offices and distribution in California and Australia and a worldwide network of distributors.

Name: Kaboodle
Description:
Kaboodle was founded in 2005 originally providing installation services to small white goods distribution companies. We have since grown to become a key supplier of white goods for housebuilders and developers all over the UK along with developing what is now the UK’s largest independent home appliance installation service for many of the country's leading appliance retailers.

Kaboodle are also the chosen installation partner for most premium appliance brands handling a variety of installation projects direct for the manufacturer, such as new product launch campaigns installing for reviewers, direct to consumer sales, product recall programs, and warranty exchange services. Kaboodle provide full National coverage operating from our 4 strategically located depots in Stevenage, Highbridge, Wetherby and Glasgow.

Due to the varied nature of the work we carry out, Kaboodle can easily scale to manage anything from a single item home installation to a fast moving 800 plot flatted development where permanent site presence is required. We genuinely mean it when we say no job is too big or small and you will receive the same level of care and attention no matter what the size of your project.

Kaboodle are very proud to be a zero landfill company and all waste packaging is processed at our in-house recycling facility in Stevenage.
Kaboodle have recently undergone an IT upgrade cutting our paper usage by 95% through the launch of our very own Kaboodle App. The system allows engineers to complete installation reports, log electrical and gas readings and add pre and post installation images all through their phone. The built-in client portal also allows clients access to archived installation reports and POD’s along with live job statuses all at the touch of a button.

From its very inception through to the present day, Kaboodle's success has been built around our relentless passion to provide the perfect customer experience. Get in touch to find out how Kaboodle can help you.

Established in 1936 under Gabriel Antaki, the company grew up to become Antaki Group. Decades later, the company is still loyal to its roots, which are to provide true satisfaction to its customers and potential clients. This modest enterprise undertook its first steps as a photography shop with several commercial representations.

A little less than a century later, Antaki Group pillars became consumer electronics, office equipment, home appliances, home automation, IT, photography, retail shops, warehousing facility & real estate.

Antaki Group Values
----------------------------
Our companies are connected by our Values. Our Values are the moral compass of our business. They guide us in conducting business and set our relationship with our partners.

Our Mission

To be the preeminent provider of superior consumer goods and services by consistently improving the quality of our imported products; add value for clients through innovation, foresight, integrity, aggressive performance; and to serve with character and ethics.

Name: Warshauer Electric Supply
Description:
About Warshauer Electric Supply
Founded in 1954, Warshauer Electric Supply has over 70 years of experience as an independently owned electrical wholesaler and was recently acquired by Rexel. Warshauer is more than just a full-service 
supply house – it serves as a trusted partner for all things electrical. The company provides extensive 
expertise across a range of services. With five convenient distribution locations throughout New Jersey, Warshauer proudly offers free delivery to any jobsite and promises exceptional fill rates at very 
competitive price levels. The company’s sales philosophy is simple: combine value-added solutions with an unmatched level of expertise. Additionally, Warshauer is a recognized industry leader in education and training, offering professional development programs for licensed contractors (WTECH), aspiring 
electricians (WTRADE), interior designers (IDCEC) and architects (AIA), supported by a variety of accreditations and certifications.

About Rexel USA
Rexel USA, the parent corporation for Rexel Group business activities in the United States, is 
headquartered in Dallas, Texas and is one of the largest distributors of electrical products, data 
communication, and related supplies in the United States. Rexel USA operates its electrical distribution business in the United States through nine Regions that go to market under various banner and trade names, including Rexel, Rexel Automation, Gexpro, Mayer, Talley, and Platt Electric Supply. In addition to an online store, Rexel USA has a distribution network of over 450 warehouse storefront locations throughout the U.S.

Name: Live Electrical Distribution (UK) Limited
Description:
Live Electrical Distribution (UK) Limited is the industry's leading supplier of electrical switchgear, circuit protection, and distribution boards. We specialise in providing an extensive range of electrical products that cater to the diverse needs of residential, commercial, and industrial clients. Our commitment to quality and excellence has earned us a reputation as a trusted and dependable partner for clients seeking top-quality electrical products.

Our expertise includes circuit protection and consumer units to meet the diverse needs of the end-user. Our product portfolio includes various solutions, such as Arc Fault Detection Devices (AFDDs) and Busbar. We also offer Control Devices, Din Rail Enclosures, and EV Charging Units to meet the changing needs of our customers. Our Fuse Carriers, Fused Switches, and Insulated Consumer Units are designed to ensure safety and reliability.

We provide a range of Isolation Switches, MCB Distribution Boards, and MCB Lockout Kits. Our MCBs, MCCB Enclosures, and MCCB Panel Boards are certified to UK standards and comply with the latest wiring regulations. We also offer MCCBs and Metal-Clad Consumer Units for enhanced protection.

Our extended product line includes Meter Boards and boxes RCBOs, RCDs, and Rotary Isolators IP55/65/66. Safety is our top priority, and we offer Rubber Safety Matting and Surge Protection SPDs. Description:
Codelocks designs and distributes a wide portfolio of innovative, standalone keyless door locks and access products for a range of growing markets. Convenience is at the heart of all our products.

Innovative technology plays an increasingly important role in enabling smart lock features. Codelocks NetCode is the smart way to generate time-sensitive codes which can allow temporary access. Our product innovation is bringing the convenience of access control to new markets, such as short-stay rental property, leisure facilities, music studios, schools and colleges, as well as traditional office buildings.

KitLock by Codelocks is a convenient and stylish alternative to traditional key-operated locker locks. Cabinets and lockers in any setting, including gyms, leisure centres, schools, hospitals, data centres and offices can be opened using a keypad code, eliminating the inconvenience of coins and keys.

Our products are cost-effective, easy to fit and programme, suitable for new installs and retrofits. We offer full access to expert technical advice and customer support and our products are available through a number of channels including direct web sales, locksmiths, installers, major resellers and OEMs.

We are a global business with our UK headquarters in Newbury, Berkshire. Products are widely available for both commercial and domestic use. We have offices and distribution in California and Australia and a worldwide network of distributors.

Description:

Seit über 25 Jahren sind wir erfolgreich als beratendes Vertriebsunternehmen für innovative, passgenaue und kostengünstige Lösungen in den Bereichen elektromagnetische Verträglichkeit (EMV) und Hochfrequenz (HF) tätig. 
Wir vertreten in der DACH-Region die Spitzenprodukte international führender Hersteller und bieten erstklassige herstellerunabhängige Beratung. 
Die Leitlinien unserer Arbeit sind Fairness, Flexibilität, Qualität, Schnelligkeit, Termintreue und vor allem kompetente Beratung. 
Unsere hervorragend ausgebildeten Ingenieure und Techniker sprechen die Sprache unserer Kunden. Gemeinsam mit ihnen erarbeiten sie maßgeschneiderte, individuelle Lösungen auch für anspruchsvollste Anforderungen – und das bei überzeugenden Preisen. 
Selbstverständlich beobachten und analysieren wir aktuelle Marktentwicklungen genau. Damit sind wir bestens gerüstet, den ständig wachsenden und sich verändernden Bedürfnissen der Branche mit einem breiten Angebot innovativer Produkte und den entsprechenden Serviceleistungen zu begegnen.
Perfektion ist unser Anspruch.
Unser Ziel ist es, die Erwartungen unserer Kunden nicht nur zu erfüllen, sondern zu übertreffen.
Testen Sie uns!

Fondée en 1984, CENELEC est une société basée à Casablanca, spécialisée dans l'importation et la distribution de matériel électrique industriel, notamment les systèmes de control-commande, régulation et affichage digital, comptage et temporisation, détection de proximité, signalisation sonores et lumineuse, automatismes, instrumentation et accessoires de câblage.

Avec plus de 39 ans d'expérience, CENELEC a développé un large catalogue de produits de qualité et acquis une expertise technique solide, nous permettant d'identifier et de répondre efficacement aux besoins de nos clients. Notre entreprise se distingue par la qualité de son assistance, tant en termes de conseil que de service après-vente.

Nous entretenons des relations durables avec plusieurs fournisseurs internationaux européen et asiatique, tels que SIRENA, AUTONICS, AECO, KAIWEETS, COMEPI, GIC, TEMPSENS, SHENLEE, LEYU, ATV…  Nous avons plus de 39 ans de partenariat avec certains d'entre eux.
CENELEC est votre partenaire de choix pour tous vos projets électriques industriels. Notre équipe de professionnels expérimentés est prête à vous accompagner à chaque étape, depuis la sélection des produits adaptés jusqu'à l'installation et la maintenance. Nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions innovantes et fiables à nos clients, en veillant à ce que nos produits et services répondent aux normes les plus strictes en matière de qualité et de sécurité.


Pour plus d’ informations, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter. Nous nous ferons un plaisir de vous répondre dans les meilleurs délais possibles.

Pour rester informés de nos actualités, promotions et événements, n'hésitez pas à visitez notre site web : www.cenelec.ma ou à nous suivre sur les réseaux sociaux.

Faites confiance à CENELEC pour tous vos besoins en matériel électrique industriel. Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui et laissez-nous vous aider à mener à bien vos projets.

Name: ExcessCo
Description:
At Excessco, we specialize in transforming surplus inventory into valuable opportunities. We understand that excess stock can be a challenge for businesses, tying up resources and occupying valuable space. That's where we come in. 
With an experience team in Semiconductor Industry our mission is to offer global audience to the Company's excess stocks and non-moving inventory and thus help companies efficiently manage their excess materials while maximizing returns. Whether you're dealing with overstock, obsolete inventory or surplus materials from completed or uncompleted projects, we provide tailored solutions that align with your business goals. Our approach is simple: we buy and sell excess stock, offering a hassle-free process that helps you clear out your warehouse and recover value from unused assets. We work across various industries, ensuring that your surplus inventory finds a new purpose, whether through resale, recycling, or repurposing.
At Excessco, we pride ourselves on being a trusted partner, delivering transparent, efficient, and sustainable solutions for businesses looking to optimize their inventory. Let us help you turn your excess stock into success.

Name: Kno-Tech Solutions
Description:
Kno-Tech is sinds 1996 specialist op het gebied van productbeveiliging in generale zin. Aanvankelijk vormde de detailhandel de basis voor het technisch georiënteerde Kno-Tech van nu.

Door te kijken naar (technische) ontwikkelingen, bijvoorbeeld RFID en te luisteren naar (potentiele) opdrachtgevers heeft Kno-Tech een spectaculaire groei doorgemaakt.

Vanwege de groeiende vraag, naar specialistische oplossingen, is onze organisatie uitgegroeid van een bedrijf wat zich in eerste instantie alleen richtte op productbeveiliging naar een volledige systeem integrator. Samen met u werken we aan concrete en succesvolle oplossingen om uw processen te verbeteren. Kno-Tech biedt totaaloplossingen van strategieontwikkeling tot implementatie.

Ongeacht het product is een goede begeleiding noodzakelijk. Zodoende geeft Kno-Tech na de installatie van haar systemen een uitgebreide training aan gebruikers. Eventueel aanwezige bedrijfsprocedures kunnen hierin eveneens behandeld worden!

Naast de gebruikelijke nazorg van onze After-Sales staat er een volledig geoutilleerde technisch service dienst tot uw beschikking.

Door opleiding en ervaring zijn onze technisch service dienst medewerkers door en door vertrouwd met onze producten hetgeen een optimale service waarborgt.

Mocht u uw specifieke product of vraag niet aantreffen op onze website neem vooral contact op. Onze medewerkers adviseren u graag!

Name: ARPOL
Description:
Firma ARPOL od prawie 30 lat specjalizuje się w dystrybucji elektronicznych systemów ochrony mienia. Głównymi odbiorcami naszych produktów są wiodące firmy instalacyjne oraz integratorzy i specjaliści od zabezpieczeń.

W ofercie firmy ARPOL znajdują się kompleksowe rozwiązania z zakresu systemów telewizji dozorowej, nagłośnieniowych i konferencyjnych, interkomowych, sygnalizacji pożaru, włamania i napadu, kontroli dostępu renomowanych i uznanych na świecie producentów: BOSCH, AXIS, GENETEC, CIAS, DAHUA, VIDEOTEC, 2N, TAMRON, ASSA ABLOY i wielu innych.

Oferujemy rozwiązania przede wszystkim dla obiektów wymagających szczególnej ochrony, gdzie podstawowym kryterium wyboru jest jakość i niezawodność urządzeń, ich parametry techniczne oraz możliwość integracji celem stworzenia kompleksowych systemów ochrony. Zapewniamy profesjonalną pomoc techniczną na każdym etapie współpracy.

W każdym z naszych oddziałów dysponujemy salą konferencyjną, gdzie regularnie przeprowadzamy prezentacje i szkolenia.

Name: Viking Tech
Description: Viking Tech is a Global Passive Manufacturer in design Thin Film, MELF, Functional Thick Film, Automotive Resistor, Metal strip current sensing , RF Inductor and power Inductor, Capacitor, manufacture and supply of advanced electronic components. The manufacturing Facilities located in Taiwan with certified high quality system of automotive IATF16949, Medical ISO13485, ISO9001, ISO14001. Viking’s advanced technology of Precision Thin Film, MELF, Metal Strip, Thick Film, High reliability product used in wide range of diverse applications, which can be found in Automotive, Industrial, Medical devices, Telecom, Commercial, IoT Home appliance, Battery management...etc. Viking is listing company in Taiwan and we support Worldwide customers from well-known end customers to EMS, ODM and distributors and we have global offices in North America, Europe, Asia pacific to provide reliable service. Offering high precision thin film resistors and RF inductors Viking is a global leader of ultra-precision resistors, manufacturing tolerance down to 0.01% and TCR down to 1 ppm in a broad range of package sizes. With advanced thin film technologies and competitive costs, we're also capable of developing Thin Film, Multilayer, RF and Power Inductors, which are suitable for various applications, the tolerance is able to down to 1%, and 13GHz onwards of SRF. Viking is working always toward High Q, High Frequency and High Current with tight tolerance and miniature size. Your reliable partner in Resistor, inductor and capacitor Viking designs various coating, lithography, customized design on Thin/Thick Film process and OEM services. We offer competitive, quality components to satisfy the needs of our customers. Viking Tech has the experience in the design of innovative components, offering support and service to Global customers that demand a genuine manufacturing partner. Our goal is to be the leader in design, manufacturing, and marketing of miniature, precision passive components.

Name: ACCETEL
Description:
Accetel es una marca que nace desde la necesidad de proporcionar al sector de los accesorios tecnologicos un nuevo paradigma centrado en la calidad e innovación. Sus más de 20 años de experiencia han consolidado a Accetel en el sector, permitiendo un reconocimiento y un respaldo, no sólo en el mercado nacional, sino también el mercado asiático, europeo y americano. Los factores que han permitido su consolidación en el sector son la innovación, tanto en el desarrollo de productos como en su estrategia de negocio, y la calidad, en la fabricacion  de productos y en la relación con los clientes. 
ACCETEL es una empresa que se basa en el desarrollo de la industria tecnológica  electrónica y digital, que requiere un seguimiento de alto rendimiento a la altura de las necesidades del consumidor. Desde sus inicios, Accetel no ha dejado de crecer, ampliando el catálogo año tras años hasta llegar más de 10000 en diferentes gamas de productos. La marca se ha centrado en el desarrollo de productos electrónicos y digitales estándar de alta calidad y gran innovación.

La marca insiste en la alta calidad como base y en la nueva tecnología como fuerza motriz para proporcionar productos confiables y rentables a los consumidores de todo el mundo.

Gracias a una red de distribución con sede central en España y amplia presencia internacional, (Portugal, Francia, Italia, Alemania, Holanda, Chile, Tailandia, Indonesia y China) nunca hemos dejado de innovar y mejorar, por eso hemos hecho cosas tan increíbles como lanzar una segunda marca (LEKUS) para llegar más allá en el mercado Premium.

Con sucursal en China, en la provincia de Guangzhou, que respalda nuestros canales de ventas en todo el mercado asiático. Tenemos un equipo de profesionales que dedica a la  investigación y desarrollo de los productos más contemporáneos y novedosos del mercado.

Name: Epic Cables Especiales SAS
Description:
With more than 14 years of experience specializing in electrical cables, EPIC works closely with our customers to determine comprehensive solutions tailored to specific electrical cable needs. Thus, through detailed knowledge of the application, installation conditions, specific regulatory requirements, technical characteristics and particular requirements; we provide an effective solution to the need for cables ensuring compliance with the given conditions.    

In the same way, we work in close collaboration with several allied factories, both national and international, allowing us to offer real, state-of-the-art solutions adapted to specific needs. 

In addition, we are aware of the impact of the post-consumption of electrical conductors, which is characterized by polluting practices, informality, criminal activities and adverse social consequences. Consequently, and as part of our environmental responsibility, we carry out a responsible, sustainable, ethical and legal management of cable waste, implementing a strategy based on the principles of the circular economy.

Name: Slim Parts
Description: A história da SlimParts nasceu de um sonho, movido por paixão. Aposto que você já parou para pensar como tudo fica mais fácil quando encontra exatamente o que precisa para sua assistência em um só lugar. Foi assim que a SlimParts começou, lá em 2020, no coração de São Paulo. Somos um grupo de fanáticos por Apple e tecnologia, que entende a dificuldade de encontrar peças de qualidade. Aquelas peças que são mais difíceis de achar do que um parafuso de smartphone que caiu no chão durante o reparo? Então, praticamente impossível, né? Era exatamente assim que nos sentíamos ao ver donos de assistências tentando encontrar peças Apple de qualidade no mercado nacional. Por isso, decidimos mudar o jogo. “Slim” de fino e elegante, e “Parts” de peças. Juntamos tudo e surgiu a SlimParts: o seu ponto de encontro para peças Apple de primeira linha, com aquele toque de elegância que seu dispositivo merece.

Name: Arvia Electric
Description:
Elektrik ve Elektronik Anahtar Priz hizmetleri alanında faaliyet göstermektedir. Geçmiş deneyimlerden kazanılan ticari itibar ve tecrübenin desteği ile Arvia Elektrik sektöründe marka olma yolunda ilerlemeye taviz vermeden devam edecektir.
Bugüne kadar birçok projeyi başarıyla tamamlayarak, memnun müşteriler ve güçlü referanslar kazandık. Bu doğrultuda, hız kesmeden büyümeye devam ediyoruz. Yeni kurulan şirketimizle, Arvia markası altında elektrik ve elektronik anahtar priz alanında imalat ve hizmet kalitesinden ödün vermeden ilerlemeyi hedefliyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyetini önceliğimiz yaparak, işlerin zamanında ve eksiksiz bir şekilde tamamlanmasını sağlıyor, hem kendimizi geliştiriyor hem de müşterilerimizle daha güçlü diyaloglar kurarak birlikte daha büyük başarılara imza atmayı amaçlıyoruz. 
Arvia Elektrik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Şirketi tüm kalıp çalışmalarını tasarımdan paketleme ve pazarlamaya kadar kendi bünyesinde sürdürmektedir. Teknolojik yatırımlarıyla her geçen gün daha daha güvenli adımlarla yolunda ilerleyen firmamızın temel prensibi koşulsuz müşteri memnuniyetidir.

Name: Walter Kluxen GmbH
Description:
KLUXEN – Ihr verlässlicher Partner für hochwertige Artikel aus dem Elektrobereich.

Seit 1939 am Markt und mittlerweile als eines der führenden Elektrogroßhandelsunternehmen in Deutschland bekannt, profitieren wir noch heute stark von unserem Ursprung als Familienunternehmen. KLUXEN ist nicht nur für seine Kund*innen und Lieferanten ein zuverlässiger und kompetenter Geschäftspartner, sondern auch ein wichtiger und innovativer Arbeitgeber mit stetigem Wachstum, der sichere Arbeitsplätze bietet.

Als Elektrofachgroßhändler bietet KLUXEN Kund*innen aus dem Bereich Handel, Handwerk und Industrie ein umfangreiches Sortiment: Mit rund 920.000 hochwertigen Artikeln aus den Produktbereichen Elektromaterial, Industriebedarf, Licht, Werkzeug, Daten- und Netzwerktechnik, Hausgeräte, Haustechnik, Multimedia sowie Erneuerbare Energien und Gebäudetechnik (EEGT) wird eine vielfältige Produktpalette zur Verfügung gestellt. Die Walter Kluxen GmbH ist an 9 Standorten im Norden Deutschlands vertreten.

Spaß am Erfolg haben und sich mutig den Veränderungen des Marktes stellen, sind Grundsätze unseres Leitbildes. Wir nutzen als Arbeitgeber und Elektrogroßhandel bestehende Chancen am Markt und behalten uns dabei stets eine verlässliche und familiäre Firmenkultur. Im Umgang miteinander sind wir gradlinig, berechenbar und fair. Unsere Zusammenarbeit ist geprägt von größtem Respekt, Ehrlichkeit und Wertschätzung. Untereinander, zu Kunden sowie zu Lieferanten.

Als professioneller Dienstleister im Elektrogroßhandel legen wir sehr großen Wert auf eine fachlich kompetente, freundliche Beratung und Betreuung unserer Kund*innen. Aus diesem Grund arbeiten wir hart daran, uns in allen Bereichen kontinuierlich weiter zu verbessern. Darüber hinaus bieten wir unseren Kund*innen ein umfangreiches Service-Paket, um ihnen das Tagesgeschäft zu erleichtern. Wir freuen uns auf eine erfolgreiche und partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit!

Name: Volta Grup
Description:
Suntem o companie cu capital 100% românesc, fondată în anul 2008 în orașul Piatra Neamț specializată în distribuția și comercializarea la nivel național de echipamente și soluții electrice, producător de energie regenerabilă care își propune să crească prin inovație și excelență antreprenorială. 
Din 2001 și până în prezent am evoluat într-un ritm alert și continuu, susținuți de angajați, de clienți, de colaboratori! 
Politicile de preț practicate, parteneriatele încheiate cu furnizorii, calitatea produselor și serviciilor noastre, ne-au propulsat cu repeziciune în primii 5 distribuitori de soluții și echipamente electrice din România.
Sediul, depozitul central și primul showroom de corpuri de iluminat Volta Grup se află în Piatra Neamț, dar ne puteți găsi și în Iași, unde deținem un showroom și un depozit, în Brașov și Brăila unde funcționează depozite, dar și în Cluj-Napoca unde am inaugurat în 2019, cel mai modern showroom de corpuri de iluminat din România.
Investim constant în infrastructura de depozitare și în logistică, dar mai ales în oameni, inventăm, dezvoltăm și comercializăm produse și soluții sigure și eficiente pentru clienții noștri!
Nu facem nici un fel de compromisuri privind calitatea activității pe care o desfășurăm, suntem convinși că etica și valorile morale reprezintă cheia unei afaceri de succes!

PORTOFOLIU PRODUSE
Volta Grup comercializează și distribuie la nivel național prin flota proprie, de 67 mașini, următoarele categorii de produse:
* Stații de încărcare mașini electrice

Description:
Immergas is gevestigd in Brescello di Reggio Emilia, een paar meter van waar in 1964 de eerste werkplaats werd opgericht. Op deze locatie werken meer dan 600 medewerkers op 60 duizend vierkante meter overdekte oppervlakten, met inmiddels 16 productielijnen, waar meer dan 8 miljoen verwarmingstoestellen zijn geproduceerd. Dit maakt Immergas een van de grootste verwarmingsfabrikanten in Italië, Europa en de wereld.

De Immerfin Group holding is de eigenaar van alle productiecentra en het commerciële netwerk. 
De voorzitter is een van de drie stichtende partners, Romano Amadei. Immergas exporteert naar 50 landen over de hele wereld via 12 commerciële vestigingen in Europa en 2 in Azië en sinds dit jaar ook in Canada. 
In Italië worden 130 Immergas toestellen ontworpen en vervaardigd, in Slowakije, in Iran en in China worden producten vervaardigd die bestemd zijn voor niet-Europese markten.

Per 1 November 2021 is onze vestiging in Nederland toegevoegd, gevestigd in Zwolle! Immergas Nederland richt zich op de levering van warmtepompen.

Name: PT. Bannister Corporindo
Description: Indolistrik.com adalah salah satu online shop di bidang elektrikal yang terbesar di Indonesia. Indolistrik merupakan generasi kedua dari perusahaan yang bergerak lebih dari 52 tahun yaitu sejak tahun 1965 sebagai wholesale maupun retailer produk elektrikal terbesar di Jakarta. Perusahaan kami juga adalah sole distributor dari beberapa merek terkemuka di Indonesia sehingga kami adalah salah satu perusahaan yang memiliki ready stock terbanyak di Jakarta. Dengan pengalaman mengelola perusahaan yang melayani Retailer, Wholesaler dan Project di Jabodetabek dan kota-kota lain di seluruh Indonesia, kami mendirikan indolistrik di bawah management PT. Bannister Corporindo sebagai divisi online untuk menjangkau masyarakat yang lebih luas dan memberi kemudahan bagi customer untuk berbelanja online. Indolistrik merupakan e-commerce alat listrik yang memiliki stock produk, bukan hanya menampilkan katalog produk. Sebagai perusahaan yang sudah lama established bidang elektrikal, harga kami adalah salah satu yang termurah di Indonesia. Selain itu perusahaan kami memiliki sales dan tenaga ahli yang berpengalaman dan memiliki pengetahuan yang luas di bidangnya yang akan membuat customer merasa nyaman berhubungan dengan kami. Kami menawarkan lebih dari 750.000 jenis produk dari 180 merek yang terkemuka. Dan kami juga berkomitmen untuk menyediakan informasi lengkap mengenai setiap produk kami sehingga memudahkan customer untuk mengenali spesifikasi barang yang dibutuhkan. Kami juga berkomitmen untuk menampilkan foto barang yang sesuai dengan barang aslinya sehingga customer dapat melihat dengan lebih jelas product yang mereka perlukan.

Name: SmartSense B.V.
Description:
Founded in 2023 and based in Netherlands, SmartSense BV is a technology-driven company pioneering advanced ethylene gas sensing solutions for the agri-food industry. Our mission is to reduce post-harvest food loss by delivering high-sensitivity, graphene-based sensors that enable real-time monitoring and proactive quality control.

Our flagship solution, offers 10x the sensitivity, providing accurate ethylene measurements at P.P.B (parts per billion) levels. Easily integrated into ripening chambers, cold storage, greenhouses, and transport systems, it supports shelf-life prediction, ventilation control, and smart logistics decisions.

By partnering with growers, exporters, ripening centers, and retailers, SmartSense helps extend shelf life, improve sustainability, and build more resilient food supply chains.

Name: Grand GSM
Description:
Who are we?
The Grand GSM company, founded in Dubai, UAE, is a wholesale distributor of mobile phones and spare electronic parts. That perfect place to find both brand-new and pre-owned or refurbished mobile phones in their best conditions.
GrandGSM offers not only phones but also a wide selection of original LCD screens produced in the official factories of the respective brands. We provide great deals and the best prices for each customer.
What’s more? Our team of professional experts specializes in re-commerce as well. This probably sounds unfamiliar to you, and no, this is not about e-commerce.

What is Re-commerce?
Re-commerce is the process of buying and selling used pre-owned consumer electronics, in our case, mobile phones. Before selling used phones, each of them should pass through a high-level testing and assessment process. Simply saying, with new innovative approaches and high-quality tools we give second life to mobile phones of all kinds.

How is the testing and assessment process being done?
The testing and assessment process includes four phases:
- Sorting mobile phones. This is the very first thing we do when we receive the products in our warehouse. Our experts sort the phones according to their appearance depending on the damages, scratches, deformations, and notches.
- Testing. It is the central part of the assessment process. In this stage, engineers test the full functionality of each device’s software.
- Cleaning. In this stage the memory and data of each phone are cleared by restoring it to the factory state. It enables the user to adjust the phone settings from A to Z according to individual convenience.
- Grading. In this final stage, based on their appearance and functionality, mobile phones get their grading mark: A, B, C, or D.

Re-commerce is part of eco-friendly business sphere and being among the contributors of such huge culture helps us to do our utmost to make customers feel satisfied and of course responsible for mother nature.

Name: Concourse Technology
Description:
Design and manufacture of lifestyle & mobility equipment including the internationally awarded and patented Smart Wheels.

We focus on:

•	Portability: Compact and light-weight design aimed at making life easier
•	Compatibility: The ability to integrate with a variety of other products
•	Clever: Ingenious design elements, sophisticated engineering and the latest in wireless technology to deliver performance excellence

These principles make our products some of the most highly versatile, useable and desirable products available.

In 2015, following the development of our CBM3 push golf buggy – we set out to deliver a remote-controlled power system to partner it.

Logic pointed to a system that had self-propelled wheels that could communicate wirelessly with full remote-control functionality. We quickly discovered that this would be a global first, which meant taking a clean sheet of paper. 

After the 18 months of R&D we had the first working prototype of the ‘Smart Wheels’ and in November 2016 a global patent was filed. 

Two things became apparent over this period:
1.	We could see why it had never been done before - it was incredibly difficult
2.	There had to be a more deserving application than just golf - wheelchairs were the obvious goal

In 2019 the Smart Wheels were launched into golf, with the future application of wheelchairs always in mind. Golf has been a brilliant application to prove, test and refine our technology. 

It was then all about wheelchairs. This meant: a lot more power, the first ever Bluetooth Joystick controller for wheelchairs, a wheelchair compatibility solution, and medical device certification – as a starting point.

Smart Wheels today:
•	Over 30,000 hours of R&D completed
•	A granted Patent and another filed
•	Twice awarded the Australian Government’s coveted AC program
•	Winner of two of the world’s most prestigious design awards

A proud Australian company innovating solutions to improve lives globally - with plenty more to come.

Durch den wertschätzenden Umgang untereinander sowie mit unseren Kund*innen und Partner*innen im Sinne unserer Werte Respekt, Eigenverantwortung, Nachhaltigkeit, Innovation, Loyalität und Transparenz sichern wir unseren Geschäftserfolg.

Posiadamy własną siedzibę w Łomiankach pod Warszawą gdzie mieszczą się biura, magazyny, warsztaty serwisowe, sale konferencyjne i szkoleniowe.

Nasza oferta przeznaczona jest dla wymagających klientów, ceniących najwyższą jakość i bezkompromisowe wsparcie techniczne i serwisowe.
Aby temu sprostać zatrudniamy fachowców z wieloletnią praktyką, wyposażonych w najnowocześniejsze narzędzia do projektowania i instalacji systemów nagłaśniających. Nasi partnerzy zagraniczni dostarczają oprócz urządzeń również swój bezcenny know-how i doświadczenie zdobyte na najbardziej prestiżowych instalacjach na świecie. Oferują za naszym pośrednictwem usługi projektowe, pomiarowe i instalacyjne najwyższej klasy.

Posiadamy stały skład magazynowy oferowanych przez nas produktów oraz kompletne zestawy demonstracyjne. Unikalnie wyposażony warsztat serwisowy i wysokiej klasy fachowcy zapewniają szybkie rozwiązywanie problemów technicznych.
To sprawia, że jesteśmy w stanie zaoferować długoterminową, pełną gwarancję serwisową na nasze systemy.

Description:
Casio Singapore Pte Ltd was established on 7 July, 1972. In 2013 Casio transitioned into direct business in Singapore, and became the regional headquarters to oversee the expansion into the South East Region.

Casio Computer Co., Ltd. is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of consumer electronics products and business equipment solutions. Casio was established in 1957 when the Kashio brothers, Tadao, Toshio, Kazuo, and Yukio created and successfully mass-produced the world’s first purely electric, small-sized calculator. Since then, Casio has strived to realize its corporate creed of “creativity and contribution” by employing cutting-edge digital technology acquired through the development of the calculator to create innovative and imaginative products. Today, Casio’s offerings include timepieces, digital cameras, electronic dictionaries, calculators, musical instruments, system equipment, and others. Based on circuit design and high-density mounting technology expertise, Casio’s strength lies in lightweight, miniature, and portable digital equipment, continually bringing forth a wealth of imaginative products. Globally, the Casio Group employs about 11,000 people, shipping more than 100 million products per year worldwide.
