Name: Capital Distributors | Capital Marketing
Description:
Capital Marketing is Singapore's leading distributor of consumer products. 

We were appointed the exclusive sole distributor for KDK, the Japanese brand of fans in 1996. Since then, we have expanded and brought the brand into new markets like Vietnam, Brunei, Maldives, Bangladesh & more. 

In 1998, we established the Kadeka brand, providing premium cooling products that includes Wine Chillers and Chest Freezers. Over the years, the brand has continued to develop and innovate to meet the changing needs of the modern world. Our award-winning Signature Series, the first wine chiller to run on inverter technology, is a testament to such efforts. Today, besides Singapore, you will be able to find Kadeka products in markets such as Vietnam, Thailand, the Philippines & Maldives. 

In 2013, we expanded into the cooking space with the acquisition of Bertazzoni's exclusive distribution rights in Singapore. For more than 135 years, Bertazzoni has built a reputation on the quality of its engineering and a deep passion for food and family. 

In 2025, we were appointed the exclusive distributor for EuroCave in Singapore and Malaysia. EuroCave, the pioneer of wine cabinets and a brand synonymous with exceptional craftsmanship, shares a commitment to delivering unparalleled quality and innovation. With this partnership, we are proud to expand our portfolio of distinguished wine preservation solutions, catering to the diverse needs of wine enthusiasts, collectors, and connoisseurs.

Our brands can be found in all major departmental stores, online marketplaces as well as our showrooms. 

For collaboration or business opportunities, you may contact us via:

Capital Marketing (S) Pte Ltd
Address: 18 Genting Road Singapore 349477
Email: sales@capital.com.sg

Name: EGLO Nederland
Description:
EGLO geeft wereldwijd licht.

Het startschot van een groot succesverhaal valt in 1969. Ludwig Obwieser richt het bedrijf EGLO Leuchten op. Een belangrijke mijlpaal volgt in 1976 met de bouw van het eerste eigen bedrijfspand in Pill in Tirol (Oostenrijk).

Vanaf medio jaren 80 vestigt EGLO zich definitief als één van Europa's toonaangevende lampenfabrikanten met een brede collectie. Nieuwe markten worden opengebroken – en in 1986 wordt met de oprichting van de eerste verkoopmaatschappij in Duitsland de grondsteen gelegd voor de internationalisering van het bedrijf. Door de consequente ontsluiting van nieuwe markten volgt de oprichting van inmiddels meer dan 70 vestigingen wereldwijd. Deze nemen vergaand autonoom de operationele marktbegeleiding voor hun rekening. 

Vandaag de dag is EGLO één van de wereldwijd meest succesvolste aanbieders van decoratieve verlichtingsoplossingen voor de consumentenmarkt. Dit succesverhaal is het beste bewijs van de tevredenheid van onze klanten. En daar zijn wij heel trots op.

PESKIRCIOGLU A.S.originating company of SEMTECH, established in 1968 and started with producing the Radio Receivers and Tape Cassette Player Recorders under licence of Norway's world-class brand RADIONETTE. In After 1986 our Company stopped production, concentrating more on, with high peformance and rapid  development, Semtech has become famous in the field of importation and distribution of components.

Our company insists on strict quality principle. Under such condition our company tries to lower down the cost with good quality so that the competitive price can be ensured .

We are the Turkish distributor of the biggest and the most comprehensive producer of qualified electronics components and cards.

Description:
Quantum Sphere was founded in 1998 and has grown into the market leader in Australia; distributing, warehousing and delivering tier-one branded audio visual equipment to approved system integrators, resellers, installers, commercial clients and selected specialist audio-visual retailers.

As a distribution operation that continues to rapidly grow, Quantum Sphere has scalable warehousing facilities in most of Australia’s capital cities. This allows us to stock and fulfil technology orders for our clients quickly, easily, reliably, and affordably.

Our head office and logistics command facility is located in Sydney’s North Western Suburbs. In addition to wholesaling some of the industry’s biggest brands, we own and operate two manufacturing plants in China that produce innovative commercial AV products. Marketed under our own ‘Q-Tee’ brand and now exported world-wide, this range encompasses brackets and mounts for flat screen TVs of all types, commercial carts/trolleys as well as projection screens, other forms of entertainment equipment and audio-visual furniture.

QSM was introduced in 2021 and continues to gain momentum in the Australian market. It provides premium quality Professional Business and Gaming IT Monitors that are manufactured to meet your requirements.

Quantum Sphere continues to benefit from recommendations and positive word of mouth. We have become known as a company that provides our clients with a complete, flexible and consistently excellent outcome. We’re determined to maintain our good reputation by striving to deliver above expectation on every project we handle.

 A finales de 2021, hay más de 1,000 empleados a tiempo completo en todo el mundo, con una superficie total de oficinas de casi 10,000㎡ y una superficie de almacenamiento físico propia de casi 100,000㎡.

 AIGOSTAR tiene dos marcas propias europeas: AIGOSTAR y NOBLEZA. Después de más de una década de desarrollo en el extranjero, la tasa de cobertura de canales de productos y la cuota de mercado de AIGOSTAR superan con creces a todas las marcas chinas locales en Europa, convirtiéndose en el líder de la marca comercial china en el extranjero.

Name: SMELT-ING
Description:
The beginnings of the company Smelt-ing go way back to 1996. Although in 2009 there was a transfer in ownership which brought to increasing the spirit for development, new investments, solid structure as well as great teamwork and great working surroundings.



Smelt-ing LCC has enlarged as one of the major companies for trading electrical materials in North Macedonia. We have successfully geared our structure towards creating value for customers, keeping pace with ever quicker product lifecycles, shorter order lead times and growing product variants. Our results on the market are based on flexibility, shorter response times, greater resource efficiency, higher production quality and on-time delivery.



We accelerated our activities by establishing a new 2.000m2 plant in Veles, North Macedonia for assembling polyester distribution cabinets. In order to meet the demands of the market and customers, in 2011 we started with the production of the parts of the cabinets and left significant footprint in the metal processing industry. Our production activities are in accordance with ISO 9001 Quality Management and ISO 14001 Environmental Management Standards.



In 2015 Smelt-ing LCC has gradually expanded with a new investment by opening a factory of 4.800m2 in Vladicin Han, Serbia.



In 2021, Smelt-ing LCC increased the capacity of its main headquarters located in Skopje, North Macedonia and opened a main warehouse of 5.000 m2.



Our team consist of fully trained and certified professionals whose efforts are valued and honored. We operate with passion which we build through safe and positive work environment, employee engagement and teamwork.

Name: Sinetamer Brasil
Description:
A solução Sinetamer engloba a implantação de uma Tecnologia de 4ª Geração de sistema de proteção contra surtos e transientes. Mais do que proteção contra raios, temos uma solução projetada para a natureza ultrassensível de todas as variações de dispositivos baseados em microprocessador. Nossos mais de 30 anos de experiência, uma gama existente de mais de 80.000 dispositivos diferentes e uma equipe de engenharia centrada no cliente, garantem a melhor solução para sua organização.

Ao contrário do que muitos acreditam, não são os eventos catastróficos de surtos causados por raios ou empresas de serviços públicos que promovem problemas de software ou tempo de inatividade, o fato é, que quase  99% de todos os outros dispositivos de proteção contra surtos são ineficazes no tratamento de tais eventos. Frequency Attenuation Network pode efetivamente reduzir ou eliminar frequentemente até 80% das causas de todas as falhas de equipamentos elétricos / eletrônicos experimentadas por organizações em todo o mundo.

Cabman MDT taksamittareiden ja järjestelmien edustus ja myynti.

Cabman MDT on uusi All-in-One taksamittari Cabmanilta. Maailmanlaajuisesti Cabmanin laitteita on asennettu yli 40000 autoon. Suomessa Cabman MDT taksamittareita on jo noin tuhat.

Cabman MDT on MID-hyväksytty ja täyttää Suomen laissa taksamittarilta vaadittavat määräykset. Laite sopii myös KELA ajoihin. Käyttöliittymältään Cabman MDT on selkeä ja helppokäyttöinen. Suunnittelussa kaikki on otettu huomioon helpottamaan kuljettajan, sekä johdon arkea.

Kaikki tiedot yrityksen ajoneuvoista, kuljettajista, vuoroista, maksutapahtumista, ajetuista matkoista, sekä työ- ja lepoajoista tallentuvat Cabman Data verkkopalveluun, jossa niitä on mahdollista tarkastella ja muodostaa erilaisiksi raporteiksi.

Representation and sales of Cabman MDT taxi meters and systems.

Cabman MDT is the new All-in-One taxi meter from Cabman. Worldwide, Cabman's devices have been installed in more than 40,000 cars. There are already about a thousand Cabman MDT taxi meters in Finland.

Cabman MDT is MID-approved and meets the regulations required by Finnish law for a taxi meter. The device is also suitable for KELA rides. Cabman MDT's user interface is clear and easy to use. In the design, everything has been taken into account to make the daily life of the driver and management easier.

All information about the company's vehicles, drivers, shifts, payment transactions, journeys driven, and work and rest times is stored in the Cabman Data online service, where it is possible to view and create different reports.

Name: ACM Premium Audio
Description:
Die Wiederentdeckung des Analogen.

Seit vielen Jahren im audiophilen Business gilt unsere Leidenschaft der
perfekten und authentischen Klangwiedergabe. Auf dieser Suche nach 
klanglicher Perfektion haben wir für uns persönlich eine tiefere Wahrheit wiederentdeckt: die unvergleichliche Wärme und Authentizität analoger 
Musikwiedergabe. Dabei ist diese Wiederentdeckung von Vinyl und dem Einsatz analoger Geräte für uns mehr als eine nostalgische Rückkehr zu den alten Schallplatten. Es ist eine Erweiterung unseres Verständnisses davon, was es bedeutet, die Faszination von Musik in ihrer ganzen Tiefe, Dynamik  und Nuancierung zu erleben.
Während Streaming durch Bequemlichkeit, klaren Klang und Zugänglichkeit besticht, bietet die analoge Musikwiedergabe ein ganzheitlicheres 
Hörerlebnis, das viele Aspekte umfasst. Analog Hören heißt bewusst Hören ohne den ständigen Wechsel zwischen Tracks und Alben. Es ist ein Ritual 
und haptisches Erlebnis, das zur Vorfreude und größerer Wertschätzung 
der Musik beiträgt und zudem entschleunigen kann. 
Der Trend in der Weiterentwicklung der Analogtechnik geht zu reduzierter  Komplexität und ermöglicht somit auch für Laien ein einfacheres Feintuning und mechanische Einstellungen der Komponenten. 
Um Sie an dieser neuen Begeisterung teilhaben zu lassen, haben wir unser Angebot erweitert: Eine sorgfältig kuratierte Auswahl an Plattenspielern, Röhrenverstärkern und anderen analogen Schätzen ergänzen nun unser 
Produktsortiment. Wir laden Sie herzlich ein,  mit ACM Premium Audio die Schönheit der Musik und des analogen Klangs neu zu entdecken.

Name: Kiasa Heating UK
Description:
Smart, Silent, and Sustainable Heating Solutions for Homes, Workspaces, Yoga Studios, and Churches

As energy efficiency, acoustic comfort, and environmental responsibility become central to how we design and use our spaces, heating solutions must deliver more than just warmth—they must be intelligent, adaptable, and sustainable. At Kiasa, we specialize in advanced infrared heating systems that provide efficient, silent, and targeted warmth for residential, commercial, and community environments.

Infrared heating works by replicating the natural warmth of sunlight. Instead of warming the air, it transfers heat directly to people, surfaces, and objects in its line of sight—delivering fast comfort, reduced energy use, and precise zone control. This makes it ideal for a wide range of settings, from efficient homes to acoustically sensitive spaces.

Kiasa’s range includes infrared heating panels and high-output heater bars, designed for flexible use across varied environments. Panels can be wall- or ceiling-mounted for a clean, modern finish, or used freestanding for mobility. Heater bars are ideal for larger, open areas and high ceilings—perfect for yoga studios, churches, Pilates studios, wellness centers, workshops, community halls, and hospitality terraces.

With silent operation and zero emissions, our systems are ideal for spaces where quiet, comfort, and sustainability matter. No fans, no moving parts—just gentle, radiant warmth that supports relaxation and wellbeing.

Kiasa products are also smart-enabled, offering programmable thermostats, app-based control, and Wi-Fi integration for remote management and energy optimization. Users can easily schedule heating zones, reduce usage, and monitor performance in real time.

Whether you're designing a calm wellness studio or upgrading a commercial space, Kiasa’s infrared technology offers a cleaner, quieter, and smarter approach to heating—engineered for today’s world and tomorrow’s expectations.

Name: Kiasa Infrared Heating UK
Description:
THE HEATING FOR ALL SEASONS FOR ALL REASONS

Whether you’re looking to heat your home, your workspace or your outside recreational space, it has become increasingly important to consider not only heating efficiency and cost-effectiveness, but sustainability. On the one hand, we’re all looking to save money. On the other, we all need to think about saving the planet. 

Plug-and-play infrared radiation is the perfect way to tick all boxes in that it can be used for tactical top-up and task heating, or as a full heating solution for both domestic and commercial interiors. Infrared also works outdoors and is ideal for patios, garden pubs, or even to keep animals warm in kennels or in barns.

The principle behind infrared heating is simple – it’s the same way the sun delivers heat. Like the sun, infrared is ‘line-of-sight – it only heats where the radiation reaches to. Stand in the sun and you get warm. If a cloud passes overhead and gets in the way you get cooler. Because infrared radiation heats solid objects (like bodies) it provides heat within seconds – you don’t need to wait for air to warm up and circulate.

Kiasa’s infrared heating is delivered either via panels or heater bars. Panels can be wall-mounted, ceiling-mounted (generally considered the best option), or free standing and moveable. Heater bars are normally mounted reasonably high up with the radiation aimed downward. 

Kiasa’s heating products come in a range of sizes and power outputs. The technology also provides for smart, programmable, Wi-Fi driven heating. Infrared is the heating for all seasons, for all reasons.

Name: DAC Distribuciones eléctricas de automatización y control S.L.
Description:
DAC es una empresa especializada en automatización eléctrica, dedicada desde sus inicios en 2007 a la distribución de componentes eléctricos y electrónicos en la industria.
Nuestro equipo humano, altamente cualificado, ofrece soporte técnico y comercial a fabricantes de maquinaria, cuadristas e instaladores de infinidad de sectores. Pretendemos ser su aliado aportando valor desde los inicios de sus proyectos, en labores de  especificación, hasta su implementación en la industria, pasando por la formación para el manejo y programación de los equipos y  facilitando la logística necesaria para un suministro óptimo y a tiempo.
Nuestro objetivo es el éxito de los proyectos de nuestros clientes, aportar soluciones asesorando sobre los 
 componentes necesarios para llevarlas a cabo y facilitando la formación necesaria para su instalación y programación. 
En nuestro centro logístico mantenemos stock de las referencias de mayor rotación, esto se traduce en plazos de entrega muy rápidos.
Este stock es flexible y se adapta a las necesidades de los clientes, simplemente indíquenos qué necesita que tengamos y estará disponible cuando llegue su pedido.
Nuestros sistemas logísticos permiten realizar envíos exprés de los productos, indíquenos qué necesita y dónde quiere que lo enviemos, cabe destacar que contamos con reparto propio y ofrecemos envíos gratuitos a nuestros clientes en la mayoría de pedidos nacionales.
Sabemos que la formación en nuestro sector es importante, la rápida evolución de la industria requiere que estemos continuamente formándonos y formando a nuestros clientes, para ello realizamos conjuntamente con las marcas que distribuimos cursos gratuitos, le esperamos en el próximo. Seguiremos trabajando para aportar valor a nuestros clientes, siempre dispuestos a ayudarle a llevar a cabo sus proyectos en Automatización.

Name: HÜNDÜR GRUP
Description:
UĞUR ELEKTRİK: Teknolojiyle Büyüyen Güvenilir Bir Elektrik Firması

1990 yılında elektrik sektöründe tesisatçı elektrik firması olarak faaliyetlerimize başladık. Müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak, kaliteyi vazgeçilmez bir değer olarak benimsiyoruz. Şirketimiz, sektörün lider firmaları arasında haklı bir konuma sahibiz.

HÜNDÜR GRUP bünyesinde faaliyetlerimizi sürdürüyoruz ve teknolojiye ve nitelikli insan kaynaklarına yaptığımız yatırımlarla dikkat çekiyoruz. 2004 yılında HÜNKA markasıyla HÜNDÜR KABLO SAN. TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.'yi kurarak, 2009 yılında da hLite markasıyla led aydınlatma ürünlerini ithal etmeye başladık. Ayrıca 2015 yılında HÜNDÜR PAZARLAMA A.Ş.'yi kurarak, kendi markalarımızı (Hünka Kablo ve hLite) Türkiye ve birçok ülkede pazarlamaya başladık.

Müşterilerimize uzun yıllardır İstanbul Esenyurt'ta bulunan 1000 m2 merkez mağazamızda toptan ve perakende hizmet sunuyoruz. Bol çeşit, kaliteli ürünler, uygun fiyatlar ve kusursuz hizmet anlayışıyla müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutmayı hedefliyoruz. Ayrıca PERPA'daki şubemizde, satın alma ve pazarlama ağının organizasyonunu gerçekleştirerek güncel değişiklikleri takip ediyor, ithalat ve ihracat faaliyetlerimizi yönetiyoruz. Hadımköy'deki 2000 m2 kapalı alanlı depomuz sayesinde sevkiyat ağımızı hızlı ve etkin bir şekilde yönetiyoruz.

UĞUR ELEKTRİK olarak vizyonumuz, kuruluşumuzdan beri güvenle büyüyerek sektörün lider firmaları arasında yer almaktır. Misyonumuz ise çalışanlarımızın, tedarikçi firmalarımızın ve müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini sağlamak, gelişen teknoloji ve yenilikleri benimseyen, kaliteli ve verimli bir firma olmaktır.

Biz, UĞUR ELEKTRİK olarak, sizlere en kaliteli ürünleri ve kusursuz hizmeti sunmayı taahhüt ediyoruz. Müşterilerimizin memnuniyeti ve ihtiyaçlarının karşılanması için çaba gösteriyor, sektördeki liderliğimizi her geçen gün daha da ileriye taşımak hedefimizdir. Bize katılın ve UĞUR ELEKTRİK ailesinin bir parçası olun!

Name: Uvvision
Description:
UV222: De nieuwe standaard in veilige, continue desinfectie

Far-UVC-licht met een golflengte van 222 nanometer is bewezen uiterst effectief in het neutraliseren van pathogenen, waaronder virussen, bacteriën en schimmels. Tot voor kort kende deze technologie echter een cruciale beperking. Traditionele far-UVC-lampen zenden naast 222 nm ook langere, schadelijke golflengten uit. Deze zogeheten spectrale vervuiling vormt een risico voor huid en ogen, waardoor toepassing in bezette ruimtes onmogelijk was.

De oplossing: UV222 met gepatenteerd veiligheidsfilter

UV222 doorbreekt deze fundamentele barrière. Onze technologie combineert effectief 222 nm far-UVC-licht met een uniek, gepatenteerd veiligheidsfilter dat uitsluitend het gewenste licht doorlaat en 100% van alle schadelijke straling blokkeert. Het filter fungeert als een uiterst precieze poortwachter: maximale desinfectiekracht, met gegarandeerde veiligheid.

Continue bescherming, terwijl mensen en dieren aanwezig zijn

Dankzij UV222 wordt continue desinfectie mogelijk in omgevingen waar mensen en dieren permanent aanwezig zijn. Pathogenen worden in real-time geïnactiveerd, terwijl ruimtes volledig in gebruik blijven. Hierdoor wordt overdracht niet achteraf bestreden, maar direct bij de bron voorkomen.

Deze doorbraak maakt UV222 breed inzetbaar in:

Zorginstellingen, kantoren en scholen

Openbare en drukbezochte ruimtes

Stallen voor intensieve veehouderij, waar het reduceren van pathogenen en bio-aerosolen essentieel is voor diergezondheid, welzijn en bedrijfscontinuïteit

Omdat de technologie veilig is voor blootstelling binnen de geldende normen, zijn nachtelijke desinfectiecycli of leegstand niet langer nodig.

Impact: Proactieve beheersing van pathogenen

UV222 voegt een krachtige, continue verdedigingslaag toe aan bestaande hygiënemaatregelen. Het verhoogt de effectiviteit van infectie- en schimmelbeheersing aanzienlijk en draagt bij aan een structureel betere luchtkwaliteit.

Name: Girard Sudron Switzerland
Description:
Depuis 130 ans, la Maison Girard Sudron fait figure de référence sur le marché de la lumière. Son histoire s’inscrit à travers le temps, et la passion qui anime ses équipes se transmet au fil des générations.

Du fourreau pour les premières lampes Edison qui fût à l’origine de sa création en 1894, à la célèbre flamme décorative inventée en 1955, et plus récemment avec le nec plus ultra de l’ampoule décorative à filament LED souple en 2016, Girard Sudron s’affirme en qualité d’expert et créateur de lumière.
Forte de son histoire, la Maison Girard Sudron met continuellement son savoir-faire et son expérience au service d’une qualité irréprochable, dans la pure tradition des métiers d’arts.

Si les clients Girard Sudron vouent une confiance et un attachement très fort à la marque, c’est pour son côté avant-gardiste et novateur, mais aussi pour la qualité supérieure de ses produits et de ses services.

Historiquement installé au coeur de Paris, le showroom Girard Sudron, ainsi que la fameuse clinique du luminaire au BHV, sont des lieux incontournables pour tous les professionnels de la lumière.

Jour après jour, le groupe Girard Sudron construit aussi l’avenir de la lumière. C’est de la passion et l’engagement quotidien des collaborateurs désormais localisés en France, Suisse, Allemagne, Angleterre, Italie, Belgique que se structurent les idées et les produits pour l’éclairage du futur.

Pour illustrer son développement rapide et constant, la Maison Girard Sudron propose une offre de service, ayant pour objectif d’accélérer le déploiement de la technologie LED. Orientée plus particulièrement auprès des collectivités, des industries et du tertiaire, l’objectif est ainsi de réduire rapidement et efficacement les consommations d’énergie.

La maison Girard Sudron met l’histoire au service du futur avec pour seul leitmotive : La lumière, elle se montre, elle se voit, elle se vit !

- mehr als 200 Hersteller 
- über 3'000 Marken

Das EURAS-System liefert technische Lösungen für die täglichen Routinereparaturen sowie praktische Tipps und Tricks. Die EURAS Community besteht aus der größten Gemeinschaft von Servicetechnikern in Europa. Tauschen Sie Ihr Fachwissen untereinander aus und profitieren Sie von den Erfahrungen Ihrer Kollegen.

Whether you know exactly what you need and just need it fast or if you have no clue what part you need but you need to get back and running quickly, our expert sales staff asks the right questions to ensure we deliver the correct part you need, when you need it.

Our team is also available 24 hours a day, thanks to our emergency after-hours service, because we know problems happen around the clock not just from 8 am-5 pm. While our team is based out in the bay area of beautiful California, and the majestic mountains of Colorado, we have warehouses all over the country enabling us to reach you as quickly as possible.

Name: AC DOB LED
Description:
AC DOB (Alternating Current – Direct on Board) – AC DOB LED’s is a new innovative lighting technology that uses direct on board alternating current in addition to an optical lens projection system that allows us to create a much more efficient LED solution. What this means, is that we are able to create the same electrical pull without any of the external power components that traditional LED lights come equipped with. Our lights are the first to function without a ballast, driver or switch mode power supply source.
This revolutionary technology all but eliminates the costliest aspect to modern LED lights – maintenance. All modern LED lights and regular outdoor lights use either a ballast, a driver or some kind of power supply source on each individual light to power itself. While the bulb itself might stay intact, this component usually lasts 1-2 years, depending on environment and can be extremely costly when factoring in regular maintenance and replacement costs to maintain constant upkeep.

Lens Technology - Most high-pressure sodium lamps and current LED solutions utilize some type of mirroring system to spread light. This system creates a lot of heat and causes energy bills to spike.
AC DOB LED lights use an optical lens technology, engineered by the same team that created the lenses for one of the world’s most popular smart phones. This lens technology allows us to use a magnification effect for redistributing light as well as control the angle that it’s distributed. This uses much less energy, stays much cooler and allows our lights to last much longer than their contemporaries.
In addition to the massive savings our lights bring, they are also certified to last 13 years and have surpassed testing standards that no other lights in history have passed before... All in a light 1/5th the size of most LED solutions.
AC DOB LED is truly a revolution to the entire lighting industry.

Name: NordicCom AB
Description:
NORDICCOM AB startade år 2000 i Växjö. Vår huvudinriktning är försäljning och marknadsföring av hemelektronik och dess tillbehör med egna varumärken. Med åren har vi breddat vårt sortiment inom hem & hushåll med flera nya produkter och vi strävar hela tiden efter nya bra kvalitets produkter till rätt priser. År 2013 flyttade verksamheten till Hovmantorp, 2017 till nya större lokaler och från 2018 startas det upp ett nytt trevligt showroom.
Personalen genomgår kontinuerligt utbildning och håller sig uppdaterade med de senaste nyheterna på marknaden, allt för att kunna leda våra kunder till rätt köp efter deras behov. Trots att företaget är ungt finns här en gedigen och mycket lång erfarenhet av både produkter och marknad. 

AFFÄRSIDÉN, är med kärnvärden som kundservice, kompetent personal och bra produkter. Tillgodose våra kunder med kvalitativa produkter så att de kan expandera i enlighet med sina behov. Detta görs via ett starkt kundorienterat koncept, som bygger på en gemensam marknadsfilosofi och med en kontinuitet av kommunikation. 

GENOM KONCEPTET, som bygger på ett långsiktigt samarbete, vill vi förändra filosofin i branschen. I samarbetet ska framgå vad som förväntas av parterna, inte bara prismässigt utan även av marknadsföring, logistik och kommunikation. Man kan i korthet säga att kunden skall känna köptrygghet i ett brett perspektiv. 

Med vår organisation och vår flexibilitet, vill vi påstå att vi besitter en fördelaktig position för att kunna bemöta kundens övriga förfrågningar. Vi kan idag med stolthet konstatera att vi trots vår korta företagshistorik arbetat fram goda lösningar för våra kunders räkning! 

VÅR MÅLSÄTTNING är att i ett långsiktigt perspektiv utöka vår verksamhet. Detta sker i enlighet med vårt koncept; god service, tillgänglighet, effektiv logistik vilket ger snabba och korrekta leveranser och våra kunders intresse av andra produkter!

Name: Naturalite Benelux BV
Description:
For more than 25 years, Naturalite is specialized in artificial fullspectrum daylight lighting in the graphics industry, the medical, dental and welfare sector. The correct use of fullspectrum daylight lamps is important for vision and health.

Naturalite is main distributor of True-Light, full spectrum daylight lamps and Dalen, biodynamic daylight leds (CCT) for The Benelux, France, Great Britain and Ireland.

The True-Light brand has been producing the original full spectrum daylight lamp for over 60 years. The origin of True-Light is in the United States. They were developed in 1960 as a simulation of daylight in space travel (NASA) and for submarines. True-Light lamps match natural daylight with a light colour of 5500 Kelvin and a daylight colour rendering of 98%. 

This makes True-Light lamps particularly suitable for natural lighting at the workplace, they contribute to a healthy working environment. Not only at the office but also at home and at the workplace at home. Because True-Light lamps match natural daylight, they give the perfect reproduction of colour. Where colour is important, True-Light lamps are used. 

True-Light lamps have a beneficial effect on metabolism, hormones and mood. As a result, they make an important contribution to the health of humans and animals. True-Light lamps have been used for decades in studies as a simulation of daylight and are used for winter depression.

Description:
The VaporExMachina GmbH & Co. KG is an experienced and competent wholesale and retail company for e-cigarettes, liquids, and accessories, operating a total of 12 branches with its own specialty stores in Germany. 

Our vision is to help shape a world where the health risks of tobacco smoking are reduced and the quality of life of our customers is improved. Every employee bears the responsibility of being a #LifeSaver by actively assisting tobacco smokers in finding a less harmful alternative and avoiding relapse. 

Respect, trust, and fairness are cultivated and promoted in all business relationships. We advocate for sustainable and ethical business practices, emphasizing transparency and integrity. We hold our employees to the highest standards of expertise and responsibility at all levels: both end consumers in our specialty stores and dealer customers in our distribution can expect first-class advice and a welcoming atmosphere at all times. Our corporate philosophy commits us to offering products of the highest quality that meet the needs of our customers, along with providing nothing less than top-notch consultation. Our customers should not just be satisfied but thrilled.

Compliance is not just a buzzword for us: with our CEO's longstanding involvement in the oldest German industry association, the Association of eCigarette Trade, we stay abreast of current regulations, anticipate new challenges early, and maintain a deep understanding of national regulation. 

Lean structures, optimized processes, and high efficiency have allowed us to continue growing and succeeding even in challenging economic times.

Name: Salama Piotr Bibik
Description:
Od ponad 30 lat łączę praktykę z teorią w branży elektrotechnicznej, specjalizując się w inteligentnych instalacjach, OZE i magazynowaniu energii. Prowadzę działalność doradczo-szkoleniową oraz tworzę eksperckie treści techniczne pod marką Napięcie Salama. Pomagam producentom, instalatorom, projektantom i inwestorom w zrozumieniu i wdrażaniu rozwiązań zgodnych z aktualnymi normami i dobrymi praktykami.

Moje działania obejmują:

- marketing techniczny i produktowy – tworzę artykuły, poradniki, infografiki i filmy, które nie tylko promują produkty, ale przede wszystkim rozwiązują realne problemy techniczne klientów,
- prowadzę części techniczne w mediach społecznościowych – wspieram marki w komunikacji z odbiorcami, odpowiadając na trudne pytania i budując zaufanie do produktów,
- weryfikuję recenzuję i koryguję merytorycznie treści innych autorów pod kątem zgodności z normami i praktyką branżową,
- szkolenia i warsztaty – edukuję zarówno pracowników firm, jak i ich klientów, przekładając złożone zagadnienia na zrozumiały język,
- konsultacje techniczne – doradzam w zakresie doboru rozwiązań, interpretacji przepisów i wdrażania technologii.
Wierzę, że skuteczna komunikacja techniczna to nie tylko wiedza, ale umiejętność jej przekazania. Dlatego każde działanie opieram na rzetelności, prostocie przekazu i zrozumieniu potrzeb odbiorcy.

Name: FreeLED
Description: Free LED guides you to efficient and energy-efficient lighting, taking into account the layout and function of the rooms, the natural incident light and the lighting needs. During the execution you can count on a team of specialized technicians, combined with a lightning-fast planning service. The result is an energy-efficient but pleasantly lit working environment. Free LED conducts a light study beforehand, so that we know exactly how many lamps we need to install and in which places they hang best for the greatest light output. You may need fewer lamps than now, because LED gives more light than any other lamp. By starting from a lighting study you can therefore save a lot in the short and long term. ADVANTAGES LED You can of course switch to LED because it is mandatory by the European climate plan. In addition, there are many good reasons to opt for LED: Energy saving LED lamps are the most energy-efficient lighting, with a consumption of 2.5 to 5 Watt. That is much less than an incandescent lamp, halogen spot or fluorescent tube. Even an energy-saving lamp consumes up to three times as much energy as an LED. Greater light output An LED lamp converts about 50% of the absorbed energy into visible light. With an energy saving lamp or fluorescent tube this is about 35% and with an incandescent lamp 10%. If you switch to LED, you therefore need a smaller number of lamps for the same light intensity. Cost savings Due to the lower consumption and the higher light output, the switch to LED lighting provides an average saving of 65 to 70 percent. The investment in LED usually pays for itself in two years. Ecological LED lamps reduce your ecological footprint: they consume 90% less energy than a traditional incandescent lamp, they last 50 times longer and they emit 40 kg less CO2. In addition, they do not contain mercury and other hazardous metals and are fully recyclable. long

Name: ARS ENERJİ
Description:
ARS Enerji, enerji sektöründe kazandığı 10 yılı aşkın deneyimi ve uzman kadrosu ile faaliyetlerine başlamış, güvenilir ve kaliteli hizmet sunmayı kendine misyon edinmiş bir firmadır. Elektrik sistemlerinin en önemli bileşenlerinden olan varyak, regülatör, reaktör ve transformatör üretimi konusunda derin bir bilgi birikimine sahibiz. Bunun yanı sıra, tamir, bakım ve onarım hizmetlerimiz ile sektördeki teknik ihtiyaçları karşılamakta ve projelerinizi zamanında ve yüksek standartlarda teslim etmekteyiz.

ARS Enerji olarak yalnızca üretimle sınırlı kalmıyor, aynı zamanda elektrik panoları ve transformatörler için gerekli sarf malzemelerinin satışını da gerçekleştiriyoruz. Bu sayede, projelerinizi eksiksiz bir şekilde tamamlamanızı sağlıyor ve her türlü elektriksel gereksinime çözüm sunuyoruz. Yenilikçi yaklaşımımız ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, her geçen gün sektördeki yerimizi daha da sağlamlaştırıyor ve geniş bir müşteri kitlesine kaliteli hizmet veriyoruz.

Firmamız, sektördeki en son teknolojik gelişmeleri takip ederek, üretim süreçlerini sürekli iyileştirmekte ve modernize etmektedir. Gelişen teknolojilere hızlıca adapte olabilen yapımız ve sürekli kendini yenileyen iş gücümüzle, elektrik sektöründe rekabetçi bir avantaj sağlıyoruz.

Amacımız, sektördeki her türlü elektriksel ihtiyacı karşılamak, müşterilerimizin beklentilerini aşan ürün ve çözümler sunarak, onların başarılarına katkıda bulunmaktır. Müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutarak, güvenilir bir iş ortağı olmayı hedefliyoruz. Müşterilerimize sunduğumuz kaliteli ürünler, sağladığımız kapsamlı hizmetler ve gösterdiğimiz yüksek iş ahlakı ile sektördeki lider firmalardan biri olma yolunda emin adımlarla ilerliyoruz.

ARS Enerji olarak bize duyduğunuz güveni boşa çıkarmamak adına, her zaman yüksek kalite, güvenilirlik ve profesyonellik sunmayı taahhüt ediyoruz.

Η PanClima είναι αντιπρόσωπος – κεντρικός διανομέας των συστημάτων κλιματισμού & ειδών θέρμανσης της Panasonic στην Ελλάδα. Η εταιρεία με την σύγχρονη οργάνωσή της και την μακρόχρονη εμπειρία των στελεχών της στην προώθηση και την εξειδικευμένη τεχνική υποστήριξη πριν και μετά την πώληση των μηχανημάτων κλιματισμού PANASONIC, ΑΜΒΙΟ, REVERSΟ. OLIMPIA SPLENDID, DAIKIN, TOYOTOMI & GREE στην Ελλάδα, είναι σε θέση να προσφέρει στους συνεργάτες της τεχνική και εμπορική υποστήριξη στα έργα που αναλαμβάνουν.

Ο έλεγχος του κλιματισμού ενός χώρου είναι πολύ βασικός παράγοντας που καθορίζει σε μεγάλο βαθμό την άνεση που νιώθει κάποιος σε έναν χώρο. Οι τεχνολογίες και οι μέθοδοι ψύξης – θέρμανσης έχουν εξελιχθεί πολύ ώστε η PanClima, μέσω του εξοπλισμού των συνεργαζομένων με αυτή τεχνολογικών οίκων, μπορεί να σχεδιάσει λύσεις για όλες σχεδόν τις ανάγκες κλιματισμού.

Σε συνδυασμό με την εμπειρία των μηχανικών μας οι σχεδιαζόμενες λύσεις μπορούν να υλοποιήσουν την βέλτιστη εμπειρία κλιματισμού, με τον μέγιστο έλεγχο, αυτοματισμό και ακρίβεια χρησιμοποιώντας την ελάχιστη αναγκαία ενέργεια. Αυτή η σύμπραξη τεχνολογίας και εμπειρίας έχει σαν πρόσθετα πλεονεκτήματα για τους πελάτες μας την ελαχιστοποίηση του χρόνου απόσβεσης της επένδυσής τους και την απρόσκοπτη λειτουργία του εξοπλισμού με ελάχιστες ανάγκες συντήρησης.

Η PanClima εκπονεί μελέτες κλιματισμού για την δόμηση σύγχρονων και κυρίως αποδοτικών ενεργειακών συστημάτων, εξατομικευμένων στις ανάγκες των πελατών της, χρησιμοποιώντας τον ευρύτατο φάσμα εξοπλισμού που διαθέτουν οι συνεργαζόμενοι τεχνολογικοί οίκοι. Οι μηχανικοί μας μπορούν να συνθέσουν ολοκληρωμένες λύσεις ψύξης – θέρμανσης και ζεστών νερών χρήσης με συνδυαστικές μεθόδους, πετυχαίνοντας την καλύτερη δυνατή απόδοση του συστήματος.

Name: Sonepar Luxembourg S.à.r.l.
Description:
Wir sind ein Global Player im Familienbesitz, Lösungsanbieter und Herausforderer. 

Qualität ist ein großes Versprechen. Daran lassen wir uns bei Sonepar jeden Tag messen: Kompetenz, Zuverlässigkeit, Flexibilität, Innovationskraft – darauf können sich unsere Kunden und Partner aus Handwerk, Handel und Industrie verlassen. Als Vollsortimenter umfasst unser Portfolio mehrere 100.000 Markenprodukte. Darüber hinaus bieten wir unseren Kunden umfangreiche Services und Lösungen an, die sie z. B. dabei unterstützen, das eigene Unternehmen effizient zu organisieren und noch erfolgreicher zu gestalten.

Wir sind Teamplayer und Einzelkönner.

Die Zukunftsfähigkeit eines Unternehmens hängt im hohen Maße vom Engagement und der Kreativität seiner Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter ab. Dabei zählen wir auf jede einzelne Person, egal in welcher Position, egal bei welcher Aufgabe. Diese Haltung ist bei Sonepar seit jeher ein entscheidender Erfolgsfaktor: Denn altbekannte Wege zu verlassen und neue einzuschlagen, hat sich für unser Unternehmen in seiner langen Geschichte schon oft ausgezahlt. 

Wir sind routinierte Arbeiter und Wegbereiter.

Gutes bewahren, Werte leben – diesem Leitbild folgen wir bei Sonepar an jedem Tag. Denn wir fühlen uns unserer erfolgreichen Tradition verpflichtet. Aber erst, wenn man den Mut hat, die vorhandenen Prozesse zu hinterfragen und wann immer nötig zu durchbrechen, können Veränderungen kontinuierliche Verbesserungen anstoßen. Das erfordert neue Kenntnisse, neue Skills und neue Ideen bei allen unseren Mitarbeitenden, die sie in ihre Arbeit einbringen. Das gilt auch bei der Verringerung unseres ökologischen Fußabdrucks.

Lhasa - Nam Long AV là nhà phân phối các thương hiệu hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực nghe nhìn, tích hợp hệ thống với hơn 19 năm kinh nghiệm tại thị trường Việt Nam.
Lhasa - Nam Long AV, điểm đến của sự hoàn hảo trong trải nghiệm âm thanh và hình ảnh. Với hơn 19 năm chắt lọc và phát triển tại thị trường Việt Nam, chúng tôi tự tin là đối tác đáng tin cậy mang đến những sản phẩm và dịch vụ hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực nghe nhìn và tích hợp giải pháp.

Lhasa là sự tiếp nối tâm huyết của Nam Long AV từ năm 2004, được định hình bởi đội ngũ sáng lập giàu kinh nghiệm và sự tinh tế trong công nghệ, nghe nhìn và tích hợp giải pháp. Tại Lhasa, chúng tôi nghiên cứu và phát triển thêm hệ thống điều khiển thông minh tiên tiến và các giải pháp tự động hóa nhà/tòa nhà được tích hợp toàn diện nhất.

Như tên gọi, Lhasa không chỉ là một địa danh nổi tiếng, mà còn là biểu tượng cho sức mạnh và tầm nhìn vượt trội. Được mệnh danh là thành phố ánh dương, Lhasa cũng là điểm tựa cho sứ mệnh dẫn đầu trong lĩnh vực nghe nhìn và tự động hóa, được thúc đẩy bởi đội ngũ sáng lập tài năng của chúng tôi.

Chúng tôi tự hào là đối tác của hơn 30 thương hiệu hàng đầu trên thế giới, kết hợp những sản phẩm và dịch vụ chất lượng nhất để mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm không giới hạn.

Name: Mindmill AB
Description:
Välkommen till Mindmill – en plats där intelligenta mätningslösningar möter framtidens behov. Vi strävar efter att revolutionera hur fastigheter och föreningar mäter, analyserar och hanterar sin vatten- värme- och elförbrukning.

Genom att utnyttja den moderna tekniken hos Kamstrups smarta mätare för IMD och verktyget LoggaMera för att visualisera data på ett informativt och intuitivt sätt, ger vi dig möjligheten att automatisera faktureringsunderlag för ditt faktureringssystem.

Vill du ta kontroll över din fastighets energiprestanda? Då är MIVO Connect, vår användarvänliga M-Bus Gateway, det perfekta valet. Med MIVO Connect kan du enkelt samla in och dela mätdata till valfria överliggande system för debitering, styrning och energiuppföljning.

Ta steget in i framtiden med Mindmill och upplev en ny nivå av effektivitet och insikt i din fastighets energianvändning. Kontakta oss idag för mer information!




Vi tillhandahåller allt Ni behöver för att komma igång med IMD.
 Det enda Ni behöver är våra smarta uppkopplade mätare och tillgång till Er data via våra system. Vi hjälper till med teknik och fördelning av kostnader genom att:

•	Ni själv scannar av mätarna och fakturerar förbrukarna 
•	Via en Gateway samla in mätarnas förbrukning
•	Vår Portal visualiserar den individuella förbrukningen och hjälper dig skapa manuella rapporter och faktureringsunderlag       
•	Automatiskt leverera information från vår portal till Er ekonomiska förvaltare  eller Ert ekonomisystem. 
       

Kommunikation från respektive mätare sker antingen trådat eller trådlöst.

Kamstrup Official partner

Name: Solshare Distribution
Description:
AlphaESS is één van de grootste fabrikanten van hybride batterijsystemen wereldwijd en levert veilige en betrouwbare residentiële, commerciële- én grootschalige energie opslag systemen in meer dan 85 landen.

Wacht niet tot morgen en kies vandaag voor een AlphaESS batterijsysteem voor THUIS of voor je BEDRIJF!

Netwerk congestie is voornamelijk een probleem van pieken en de beste oplossing hiervoor is de inzet van batterijsystemen op verschillende plaatsen in het stroomnetwerk.

Alpha ESS is al meer dan 10 jaar gespecialiseerd in de ontwikkeling en productie van veilige en betrouwbare residentiële en commerciële energie opslag systemen.

Alpha ESS staat in de top 5 van thuisbatterijfabrikanten wereldwijd. In Australië, dat bekend staat om zijn strenge elektrotechnische veiligheidsvoorschriften, is Alpha ESS de voornaamste leverancier van thuisbatterijen.

De gebruikte kobaltvrije LiFePO4 (LFP) batterijen zijn niet ontvlambaar en veilig bij breuk.

De thuisbatterijen van Alpha ESS kennen een lange levensduur van ca. 10.000 cycli. Dit betekent dat de batterijen bij 365 cycli (laad-ontlaadsessies) per jaar, meer dan 25 jaar meegaan. Een investering in Alpha ESS (thuis)batterijen is daarmee een toekomstvaste investering.

Op alle Alpha ESS SMILE producten krijgt u 10 jaar productgarantie én 10 jaar powergarantie. Met een Alpha ESS (thuis)batterij blijft u zelf in controle.

Alpha ESS wordt in Nederland vertegenwoordigd door SolShare B.V. in samenwerking met Iinno Benelux.

At Playback Distribution, our mission is to enrich the lives of entertainment enthusiasts by providing them with unparalleled access to state-of-the-art playback systems. We are dedicated to elevating the way customers experience their favorite content.

Name: TAD Audiovertrieb GmbH
Description:
TAD Gründer Hannes Knorn war ein echtes HiFi-Urgestein. Über 50 Jahren war er Teil der bundesdeutschen Branche, war aktives Gründungsmitglied der High End Society und bei der Entstehung namhafter HiFi-Manufakturen (unter anderem Audiolabor) dabei. Er hat in seinem HiFi-Leben einiges bewegt.

Im Jahr 2000 gründete Hannes zusammen mit dem Freund Achim Spelling, ebenfalls ein passionierter Musik-/Technikliebhaber und exzellenter Kenner des deutschen HiFi-Marktes, den TAD-Audiovertrieb mit einer Mischung aus Kompetenz und Leidenschaft. Beide interessierten sich für: Radios (Tivoli Audio), Röhren, klassische Lautsprecher, Plattenspieler und verfolgten die Philosophie, den bestmöglichen Klang zum attraktiven Preis anbieten zu können. Mit der Zeit wuchs die TAD-Audiovertrieb GmbH auf eine beachtliche Größe, blieb aber ein im grundlegenden Sinne „analoger“ Vertrieb mit Hang zum britischen HiFi.

Sie arbeiten mit dem britischen (Analog-) Vorzeigehersteller REGA, einer der ältesten britischen Lautsprecher-Manufakturen TANNOY, sowie FYNE AUDIO und nicht zuletzt mit dem britischen Smart-Audio-Spezialisten RUARK AUDIO zusammen. Im Jahr 2015 übernahm Paula, die jüngste Knorn-Tochter, die aktive Geschäftsführung. Sie hat die HiFi-Passion des Vaters in die Wiege gelegt bekommen und führt das Unternehmen mit den alten Idealen und neuen Vorstellungen fort. Dabei setzt sie gezielt auf europäische Hersteller. Mit der Produktion TAD-eigener hochwertiger Tonabnehmer (Markenname EXCALIBUR) und einer Verbreiterung des Programms in Richtung hochwertigen Zubehörs, weitet Paula das Produktportfolio der TAD-Audiovertrieb deutlich aus. Der Klang und die Freude am Musikhören ist unser Hauptanliegen und dafür steht TAD im Wesentlichen.

2022 starb Hannes Knorn im Alter von 75 Jahren nach langer Krankheit.
Wir werden ihn sehr vermissen – Hannes, du lebst immer in unseren Herzen weiter, du hast unser aller Leben mit Licht und Liebe und so vielen wunderbaren Erinnerungen und Erfahrungen bereichert.

Name: Total Power Europe B.V.
Description:
Total Power Europe B.V., established in 1984 and based in Oosterhout, Netherlands, specializes in designing and supplying custom-made Switched-Mode Power Supplies (SMPS) for industrial applications. The company serves an international clientele with products used in various sectors, including professional coffee machines, medical equipment, and audio systems.

All research, development, sales, and support activities are conducted from the Dutch office. Production takes place in ISO-certified facilities in India and Cambodia, in collaboration with partners such as Syrma SGS and Kuantech Co., Ltd. (Ktec).

Total Power Europe B.V. offers custom-made SMPS solutions designed to meet specific electrical, mechanical, and certification requirements. The products range in power up to 1200 watts and provide a variety of input and output options, protection methods, and additional features like microprocessor control and battery/solar charging. If necessary, the power supplies can be certified according to relevant standards and directives.

With a focus on quality and innovation, Total Power Europe B.V. is a reliable partner for companies seeking high-quality, custom-made power solutions for various industrial applications.


Visit our website: https://www.totalpower.nl

Contact us to discuss your specific power supply requirements. We are very interested in your needs and how we can assist you.

Name: ELKATHERM Polska
Description:
Elkatherm Polska to doświadczony partner w zakresie nowoczesnych systemów ogrzewania akumulacyjnego, stanowiących istotny element HVAC w budownictwie energooszczędnym. Nasze rozwiązania zapewniają wyjątkowy komfort cieplny i realne oszczędności w kosztach eksploatacji. Oferujemy grzejniki akumulacyjne Elkatherm, które dzięki specjalnym rdzeniom ceramicznym magazynują ciepło i oddają je równomiernie, utrzymując optymalną temperaturę w pomieszczeniach przez długi czas.

Systemy Elkatherm to inwestycja w przyszłość — są bezobsługowe, bezpieczne i w 100% przystosowane do zasilania z OZE, takich jak fotowoltaika. To idealne rozwiązanie dla nowoczesnych domów pasywnych i energooszczędnych, apartamentów, obiektów komercyjnych oraz budynków modernizowanych. Nasze ogrzewanie akumulacyjne nie wymaga kominów, kotłowni ani skomplikowanej infrastruktury, co znacznie obniża koszty inwestycji.

W Elkatherm Polska kładziemy nacisk na indywidualne podejście — dopasowujemy system ogrzewania do potrzeb każdego klienta. Doradzamy, wykonujemy dobory mocy oraz pomagamy zoptymalizować instalację pod kątem maksymalnej efektywności energetycznej.

Z nami zyskujesz:

niższe rachunki za ogrzewanie,

stały, zdrowy mikroklimat bez cyrkulacji kurzu,

niezależność od gazu i węgla,

nowoczesne sterowanie temperaturą w każdym pomieszczeniu.

Postaw na sprawdzoną technologię Elkatherm — lidera w segmencie ogrzewania akumulacyjnego w Europ
To nie tylko źródło przyjemności, lecz i przejaw dalekowzrocznego myślenia, ponieważ taki system ogrzewania coraz bardziej zyskuje na atrakcyjności w obliczu kurczących się zasobów paliw kopalnych. Prąd z odnawialnych źródeł energii można także pozyskiwać dla prywatnych gospodarstw domowych w sposób zdecentralizowany i wykorzystywać go do ogrzewania domu. Dzięki naszym innowacyjnym urządzeniom grzewczym jesteśmy w stanie zaoferować indywidualne rozwiązania, a to oznacza korzyści dla naszych klientów, którzy już dziś mogą czerpać zyski z tej technologii przyszłości.

It is a high- tech national high-tech enterprise integrating the research, development, production and sales of functional current collector materials. The business including the production, application and promotion of various electronic aluminum foil, high voltage and high purity battery foil, modified current collector and porous current collector.

At present, the company has advanced equipment such as the advanced PCB lubricating aluminum foil large high-speed coating production line, modified current collector production line and high-speed cutting machine. It has passed IATF16949-2016 quality management system certification and GBT29490-2013 intellectual property management system.

The R&D center of the company is led by a number of electrochemical doctors and material experts with experience of overseas famous universities, specializing in in-depth research and development of modified aluminum foil/copper foil from raw material preparation to slurry and coating. In 2016, the production line with annual output of 1000 tons was put into production. (In September 2017, the trial machine was mass-produced. It is also involved in the revolutionary research and development of porous current collector . In 2017, the company was identified as "Nanhai District and Foshan City Nano graphite aluminum Foil new material Engineering Technology Research Center". In 2020, it was identified as "Guangdong Province nano graphite modified current collector Engineering Technology Research Center". Technical innovation, service winning, committed to becoming a global leader of high-end current collector !

Wir optimieren unsere Prozesse laufend, um unsere Lieferbereitschaft und unsere Termintreue sicherzustellen. Die Schulung und Weiterentwicklung der Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter hat bei uns eine lange Tradition.

Każdy klient, który się do nas zwraca obsługiwany jest z taką samą troskliwością i zaangażowaniem.

W ramach swojej działalności spółka otworzyła nowy dział zajmujący się projektowaniem i wykonywaniem instalacji fotowoltaicznych. W obecnej chwili produkujemy rozdzielnice AC i DC dla firm zajmujących się montażem instalacji fotowoltaicznych. Wyprodukowaliśmy już ok. 45 000 zestawów zabezpieczających instalacje fotowoltaiczne w całej Polsce.

English

We are GP Batteries, one of the world's leading suppliers of primary and rechargeable batteries. With 5,000 people worldwide, we are committed to developing, manufacturing, and marketing our innovative products every day.

Although GP is at its core a battery supplier, our product range is much more than that. We also supply flashlights, headlamps, power banks and USB chargers and cables. All with a high-quality guarantee and a clear focus on sustainability.

As people's lives evolve and place more demands on our planet, we at GP Batteries feel a responsibility to develop more sustainable energy sources. We are known in our categories for our leadership in promoting sustainability. In this position, together with our partners, we play an important role in responsibly building the green future of our categories.

Name: aerocure
Description:
Who are we?
aerocure has been in the industry for over 17 years, and is 100% Australian-owned and operated. Beginning this journey as part of our sister company Homevent Pty Ltd, we are specialists in home and business ventilation solutions. We only source the best products, and as a proven supplier, our filtration and air purification products lead the world in technology and applications.
A clean and healthy lifestyle begins with the air we breathe. To date, millions of homes have enjoyed the benefits of Aerocure’s innovation as we continue to strive to provide the best products and services for our customers.
Why do we do what we do?
Are you constantly sneezing or coughing, or taking more sick leave than you need to? For many, it may be the norm to see the doctor if you have an allergy, but have you checked the airflow and circulation at your home or office? This could be the answer. COVID was an example of one airborne virus spreading through ventilation HVAC (Heating Ventilation and Air Conditioning) products. However, there are more unseen dangers. If you can save yourself a trip to the doctor or worse, why would you not!?
Just because you don’t see it doesn’t mean that it cannot affect you.
Scott Lambert, the Australian owner of Aerocure, has been working in the domestic ventilation and purified air market since the 1990s. With the modern comforts that we have in today’s world, there can be consequences of getting sick, allergies or worse! With the amount of time we spend indoors, Air circulation in a home or business is important. As a family man, Scott has made it his mission to promote a healthy and clean living environment for all!
Our Mission:
- Create a healthy and clean living environment for the home or business
- Provide the best products and solutions to our customers
- Provide the best customer experience
- Listen to our customers

Firma Adımız Fiorsan Bilişim ve Ticaret Anonim Şirketidir.

2020 yılında kurduğumuz marka şirketi, Elektrik Taahhüt işleri ile başladığı girişimcilik serüvenini toptan malzeme satışı, mağazacılık ve e-ticaret ile güçlendirmeyi başarmıştır. Sunduğumuz kullanıcı öncelikli stratejilerimiz ve ayrıcalıklı müşteri portföyü ile değerini paha biçilemez şekilde ikiye katlayarak, marka değerimizi hassasiyetle zirveye taşımayı başardık. Dünya standartlarını göz önünde bulundurarak çözüm ve güven içerikli ilkemiz ile yola çıktığımız bu serüvende; otorite rayından çıkmayarak, istikrarlı şekilde sayısız müşteriye en iyi marka sahipliğini yapmış durumdayız.

Fiorsan Elektrik Malzemeleri ; Elektrik malzemelerinde dünya markalarını satıyoruz. Profesyonellik, empati odaklı, dürüstlük ve gelişime açık bakış açımız ile istikrarlı büyüme sergileyerek, e-ticaret dünyasında saygın bir konuma yükselmeye hak kazandığımızı düşünüyoruz.
Markamız; Fiorsan alanında en kaliteli ürünleri, tüketiciye en uygun fiyat ile sunma amacıyla kurulmuş olup, Kurulduğumuz 2020 yılından bu yana geride bıraktığımız yıllar boyunca da, sektörde yaklaşımımızı aynı titizlik dâhilinde korumaya devam etmekteyiz.

Markamız üzerinden gerçekleştirdiğiniz tüm alışverişlerinizde; mağduriyet içermeyen, hızlı teslimat, iptal/iade/değişim bilinci ile yaklaşımını sağlayan müşteri temsilcilerimiz ile en keyifli alışveriş deneyimini yaşamayı mümkün kılıyoruz.

Sektördeki son gelişmeleri ve kullanıcı alanındaki güncel talepleri takip ederek, çağdaş düzeydeki teknolojiyle buluşturduğumuz web adresimizi www.fiorsanelektrik.com’u sizlere sunuyor, en iyi ekip arkadaşlarımız, güçlü ve profesyonel idari yönetimimiz ile takibini gerçekleştirerek, tüketici haklarını en iyi şekilde yaşamanızı elde etmenizi sağlıyoruz.

Hedefimiz; kullanıcı deneyimi ile e-ticaret camiasında “ziyaretçi memnuniyetini en yüksek” konumuna ulaştırmak.

Name: tm trademobile GmbH
Description:
Trademobile is a still relatively young, but fast growing wholesale company from Germany, that primarily focusses on supplying large B2B repairs-center and insurance companies with high quality spare-parts.
Our special field is supplying our customers with a wide range of Apple and Samsung spare-parts, making them able to match every possible kind of customers price and quality requirements.
Therefore we try to share our experiences and our knowledge about different quality levels with our customers and try to assist them in all concerns of the repair- and after sales process.
Through the constant exchange with our production partners in China, we can match nearly any kind of quality requirements, that our customers might have for their spare-parts.

We have implemented a double layered testing process, which consists of several testing methods, that are already being executed during the production process in China.
After a second (only visual) testing in Germany we can finally ensure constant quality levels. Likewise, we can provide low DOA-rates and can also make special adjustments to our parts. 

Our products range from classic displays of different quality and price levels to specific refurbishment material and workshop supplies.

In all areas we offer the highest quality and can therefore also show a very low return rate. 

Our philosophy is to supply the clientele with products that are characterized by their longevity, so that quality beats quantity and sustainability is given as long as possible.

If you are interested, we would like to supply you with samples of different qualities, that we would recommend for you needs.
Moreover, if you are willing to give us an idea of which quality your are currently working with, that would be even better.
That would make it possible for us to search an equal quality for a better rate.

Die Ersparnis an Zeit und Manpower bei der Anwendung sind wichtige Attribute, die dem Anwender nur Vorteile bringen. Nutzer lieben die Flexibilität der Lichtmasten bei der Anwendung. Management & Kaufleute erfreuen sich an gewonnener Energieeffizienz Ihrer Unternehmen & Organisationen und verbessern ihren Auftritt zu Gunsten der Umwelt. 
Manchmal ist weniger eben mehr und erfüllt dennoch den gleichen Zweck.

Name: Commercial Brides House
Description:
تأسست الوكاله التجاريه عام 1977 في مجال الادوات المنزليه وعملت الشركه منذ تأسسيها
على الاهتمام بسوق الادوات المنزليه المصريه
و في عام 1992 توسعت الشركه بادخال كبرى البراندات العالميه ذات الجوده 
الي السوق المصري فقامت بنقله نوعيه لسوق الادوات المنزليه فظهرت ماركات عالميه 
مثل ( تونيانا - انوكس بران - كريستار – انكور – سلامبوش – تيتانيا – جولدون  وغيرهم ). 
في عام 2018 انبثقت شركه برايدز هاوس من الوكاله التجاريه لتكون نواه جديده تؤدي دور محوري في سوق 
الادوات المنزليه المصري فكانت الشركه الموزع الحصري للشركات الكبري 
 للبرلندات السابقة بالاضافة الي مجموعة اخري مثل ( راك – هابي شيف – نيو كلاين – كيتشنوفا – لاكازا )
كما توسعت الشركه في مجال التسويق الالكتروني فقامت باحداث طرفه كبيره في مجال التسويق الالكتروني 
فكانت رائده في مجال الاون لاين كما ساهمت بتواجد البراندات المصريه بالتكنولوجيه العالميه التي 
 تماثل تماما  منتجات الشركات العالميه الكبري  وبل تعدتها في كثير من المنتجات كما ساهمت في اثراء 
سوق الادوات المنزليه المصري و اكسب المنتجات المصريه ثقه كبيره داخل السوق المصري  
وفي عام 2023 قامت الشركه بالتعاقد مع شركات التسويق العالميه و المحليه 
مثل ( امازون – نون – رنين – هومزمارت - تراست وغيرهم ) .

الرساله : تؤمن شركه برايدز هاوس بمفهوم الجوده القياسيه العاليه الاهتمام بالمنزل العصري بشكل عام والمطبخ المصري العصري بشكل خاص 
وعليه فان رسالتنا تتمحور حول ذلك .

الرؤية : تنظر شركه برايدز هاوس الي سوق المصري بعين المعالج فتعمل دائما علي سد جميع احتياجات المطبخ المصري باحدث المنتجات العصريه المواكبه لتتطور العالمي .

Na jednom mieste sa nachádza administratívne centrum firmy, rozsiahla predajňa so širokým sortimentom nielen nami dovážaných značiek, skladové priestory s tovarom okamžite pripraveným pre našich zákazníkov a odberateľov, a v neposlednom rade servisné stredisko s dostatkom náhradných dielov v ktorom vykonávame záručné aj pozáručné opravy pre nami dovážané značky.

V roku 2016 sme do nášho sortimentu dovážaných značiek pridali aj novovzniknutú značku Wolpertech, ktorá je založená na skúsenostiach a kvalite značky Güde, ponúka však ešte zaujímavejší pomer cena/výkon a tým sa stáva ešte dostupnejšou pre záujemcov o kvalitné náradie.

V súčasnosti je GÜDE Slovakia, s.r.o. výhradným dovozcom na Slovensko pre značky DEMA, DENNER edition, Güde, MenaVET, RURIS, STABILO, STABILO Sanitär, Vintec a Wolpertech z ktorých ponúkame kompletný sortiment a záručný aj pozáručný servis vo vlastnom servisnom stredisku v centrále firmy pri Liptovskom Hrádku. Už 23 rokov nám dôveruje vyše 250 stálych veľkoobchodných odberateľov, hlavne vďaka vysokej kvalite a precíznosti, ktorá je zaručená spoľahlivou výstupnou kontrolou u nemeckého výrobcu.

Duch innowacji jest kontynuowany do dziś w całej naszej firmie.
W rezultacie, stały rozwój i doskonalenie naszych narzędzi nie tylko sprawi, że praca dla profesjonalnego użytkownika stanie się łatwiejsza, ale także pomoże zaoszczędzić pieniądze, oferując szeroką gamę zastosowań,

BAIER oferuje szeroki zakres narzędzi dla najbardziej wymagających - wysokiej jakości zaawansowanych technicznie narzędzie elektryczne dla pomysłu i handlu.

Wraz z naszymi oddziałami w Niemczech, Danii, Francjii i Włoszech możemy teraz rozpowszechniać nasze narzędzie na całym świecie.

ما در سال 1385 شمسی با تکیه بر 15 سال سابقه کار فنی و مهندسی در حوزه تخصصی مهندسی برق و تاسیسات برقی در خیابان لاله زار تهران (معروف به بازار برق ایران) آغاز به کار کردیم. در ابتدا به ارائه مشاوره و خدمات مهندسی در حوزه برق صنعتی و تاسیسات برقی می پرداختیم. دو سال بعد تصمیم به گسترش فعالیت گرفتیم و بخش فروش محصولات برق و اتوماسیون صنعتی را راه اندازی کردیم. 
سابقه خوب ما در بخش های پتروشیمی، خودروسازی، تاسیسات و شبکه توزیع برق نیازمند ارائه محصولاتی با کیفیت بالا و بر اساس تاییدیه های تخصصی به مشتریانمان بود. بر همین اساس در ابتدا به ارائه محصولات برندهای معتبر اروپایی نظیر تله مکانیک (اشنایدر)، زیمنس،ساسی،فستو و... می پرداختیم.همچنین در واحد تولیدی مجموعه، گلندهای مخصوص کابل های فشار قوی با برند خودمان را تولید می کردیم. در ادامه نمایندگی فروش محصولات برق و اتوماسیون صنعتی برند ال اس الکتریک ( ال جی سابق)  را از عاملیت فروش ایران این شرکت اخذ کردیم. 
تنوع برندها با کیفیت های مختلف ما را بر آن داشت تا تنها با برند های دارای پشتیبانی قوی، کیفیت بالا و قیمت مناسب کار کنیم. بر همین اساس ، هم اکنون برق و انرژی نماینده و عامل فروش چندین برند معتبر ایرانی و خارجی در بازار برق ایران بوده و درکنار آن خدمات فنی مهندسی را نیز ارائه می دهد.
 این شرکت ارائه دهنده محصولات ال اس الکتریک، هیوندای الکتریک، چینت الکتریک، آتونیکس، اشنایدر الکتریک، زیمنس، آی اس بی اس، توان، شیواامواج، های تک و... می باشد.

Name: Clima Direct - België
Description:
Clima Direct - Dé technische groothandel voor de HVAC-professional.

Bij Clima Direct begrijpen we wat er écht komt kijken bij jouw werk als installatieprofessional. Je hebt niet alleen materialen nodig, maar ook kennis, overzicht en een partner die met je meedenkt. Geen standaard leverancier, maar een betrokken team dat weet waar jij dagelijks mee te maken hebt. Wij zijn jouw betrouwbare achterban – met een breed assortiment, technische expertise en service waarop je kunt rekenen. Want een succesvolle installatie is altijd teamwork.

Onze missie is helder: samen maken we een gezond en duurzaam binnenklimaat mogelijk. Dat begint bij goed gereedschap, de juiste producten én ondersteuning op het juiste moment. Of je nu werkt aan een woning, kantoor of industrieel project – wij zorgen dat jij kunt leveren.

We geloven dat iedereen recht heeft op een comfortabele en energiezuinige leefomgeving. Daarom doen wij er alles aan om jou als installateur te helpen die ambitie waar te maken. Van advies tot levering, alles is erop gericht om jouw werk makkelijker, sneller en beter te maken.

Clima Direct heeft alles in huis voor de professional die duurzame klimaatbeheersing mogelijk maakt. Of je nu airco’s, warmtepompen, ventilatiesystemen, montagematerialen of onderhoudsproducten nodig hebt – je vindt het bij ons. In één overzicht, met één aanspreekpunt, en altijd met verstand van zaken.

Onze ambitie? Dat iedere installatieprofessional fan is van Clima Direct. Door te doen wat we beloven, mee te denken en altijd nét dat stapje extra te zetten. Zodat jij elke dag met vertrouwen aan het werk kunt.

Clima Direct – Alles wat jij nodig hebt!

WAS KÖNNEN WIR FÜR SIE TUN?
Wir ermitteln gemeinsam mit Ihnen, ob der Einsatz eines Roboters in Ihrem Betrieb umsetzbar und sinnvoll ist und welches Robotermodell perfekt passt.

VORFÜHRUNG GEFÄLLIG?
Damit Sie sich von der Leistungsfähigkeit des ausgewählten Robotermodells überzeugen können, führen wir Ihnen dieses gerne in Ihrem Betrieb vor. Natürlich unverbindlich und kostenfrei.

KAUF ODER MIETE?
Die Beste infrage kommende Art der Finanzierung (Miete oder Kauf) ermitteln wir ebenfalls gemeinsam mit Ihnen.

Unsere Servicetechniker passen die Roboter genau an die örtlichen Gegebenheiten an, damit sie sich perfekt und passgenau in Ihren Räumen zurechtfinden. 

SERVICE/WARTUNG:
Wir sehen uns regelmäßig bei den routinemäßigen Wartungen. Dabei halten wir die Software aktuell und führen Ihre evtl. Änderungswünsche durch.

Wir sind Ihr kompetente und leistungsfähige Partner für Serviceroboter in und um Nordrhein-Westfalen und Niedersachsen.

Name: EGLO TÜRKİYE
Description:
EGLO, aydınlatma ve ev aksesuarları alanında lider bir markadır. 1969 yılında kurulan ve halen aile şirketi olarak faaliyet gösteren EGLO’nun merkezi Avusturya’nın Tirol bölgesindedir. Şirket, bugün 60’tan fazla ülkede aktif olarak faaliyet gösteren küresel bir pazar liderine dönüşmüştür.

Dünya genelinde yaklaşık 4.500 çalışanı bulunan EGLO, her gün yenilikçi tasarımlar ve ürünler geliştirmektedir. Macaristan, Çin ve Hindistan’da olmak üzere üç kendi üretim tesisine sahip olan şirket, 18 lojistik merkezi aracılığıyla verimli bir dağıtım ağı yönetmektedir.

EGLO, premium ürünlerden günlük kullanıma uygun parçalara kadar geniş ve uluslararası erişime sahip bir ürün yelpazesi sunmaktadır. Bu yelpaze; yenilikçi aydınlatma çözümleri, şık dekoratif ürünler ve yüksek performanslı vantilatörleri içermektedir. Ayrıca şirket, kalite ve tasarımın öncelik olduğu inşaat projelerine özel çözümler sunduğu proje bazlı çalışmalarda da aktiftir.

Avrupa’nın dekoratif aydınlatma alanındaki pazar lideri olan EGLO, 50.000 ürünlük bir portföy sunmakta ve her gün yaklaşık 100.000 aydınlatma ürünü satmaktadır. Şirket, 2024 yılında 523 milyon Euro gelir elde etmiştir.

Müşteri ihtiyaçlarına güçlü bir şekilde odaklanan EGLO’nun vizyonu; modern tasarımı, yüksek işlevsellik ile birleştirerek, her yaşam alanı için adil fiyatlarla sunmaktır.
**Feels like home.** – *Ev gibi hissettirir.*

Name: Stamford Electrical Compliance
Description:
Experienced & Trusted Electrical Contractors for Your Business.

Stamford Electrical Compliance oversees all electrical compliance for your facility with scheduled inspections, continuous testing, and safety assessments, guaranteeing your business complies with regulations while keeping your staff and visitors safe.

As a reliable team of electrical experts, we are committed to monitoring your systems, installations, and equipment regularly, offering professional guidance, and conducting necessary maintenance when required.

One key aspect of electrical compliance is the electrical installation condition report (EICR), also known as an installation condition report. These reports involve periodic inspections of electrical work to inspect and test the earth and socket connections, as well as the overall condition of the electrical circuits. If any issues are identified during these inspections, a remedial action plan will need to be put in place to rectify any non-compliant areas.

Regular inspections and testing encompassing emergency lighting, fire alarms, wiring, circuit installations, and other electrical components are essential. 

Get in touch Email@StamfordEC.co.uk

Seus fundadores, Nivaldo e Prince estavam ligados por uma paixão comum pela tecnologia e um sonho de trazer os melhores e mais recentes gadgets para seus colegas moçambicanos.

Name: ELIM-ELEKTRO s.r.o.
Description:
Pomáhame elektrikárom pracovať s istotou.

NÁŠ PRÍBEH

ELIM-ELEKTRO bola založená v roku 1992 v Nových Zámkoch. V čase, keď sa Slovensko osamostatňovalo a všetko bolo neisté, naši zakladatelia urobili odvážne rozhodnutie – otvoriť obchod s elektroinštalačným materiálom.

Nemali veľký kapitál. Nemali veľkú predajňu. Ale mali niečo iné – poznali elektriku a poznali ľudí.

Vedeli, že elektrikári nepotrebujú len materiál. Potrebujú niekoho, kto má skladom, kto vie poradiť a kto rozumie ich práci.

Dnes sme tu už tri generácie. Rodinná firma, ktorá prežila krízy, prekonala výzvy a zostala tu 34 rokov.

PREŽILI SME KRÍZY

Nebolo to jednoduché. Prišla kríza v roku 2008 – ekonomika sa zrútila, stavby sa zastavili. Mnohé obchody zavreli. Ale my nie.

Prišiel COVID v roku 2020 – zatvorené predajne, prerušené dodávky, neistota. Mnohí to nevydržali. Ale my áno.

Prečo? Lebo sme nestavali len na predaji. Stavali sme na vzťahoch. Naši zákazníci neboli čísla. Boli to ľudia, ktorých sme poznali menom. Ktorým sme pomohli. Ktorí sa vracali.

ČO DNES PONÚKAME

 KVALITNÝ MATERIÁL
Eaton, Legrand, Tracon, Scame ...– značky, ktorým dôverujú profesionáli.

 ODBORNÁ RADA
Rozumieme elektrike. Nie sme len predavači. Vieme poradiť s normami, značkami, riešeniami.

 RÝCHLO
Bežný materiál máme skladom. Ak niečo nie je, objednáme – príde do 24-48 hodín.

 KAMENNÁ PREDAJŇA + E-SHOP
Príďte osobne alebo objednajte online. Ako vám to vyhovuje.

ČÍM SA LÍŠIME

 Rodinná firma – tri generácie
 34 rokov na trhu (od 1992)
 Prežili sme krízy (2008, COVID)
 Lokálna prítomnosť (Nové Zámky, južné Slovensko)
 Osobný prístup (poznáme zákazníkov menom)

PREČO NÁS ELEKTRIKÁRI VYBERAJÚ

"Lebo vedia, že tu nájdu, čo potrebujú. Vedia, že im vieme poradiť. A vedia, že tu budeme aj zajtra."

KTO SME

Nie sme len obchod. Sme partner.

Nie sme najlacnejší. Ale sme najspoľahlivejší.

Sme tu 34 rokov. Budeme tu aj zajtra.

Name: Essecs S.r.l.s.
Description:
L’esperienza di un azienda e dettata non dagli anni di apertura ma dalla provenienza delle persone che la compongono.

Il primo brevetto di un circuito stampato è stato depositato nel 1903 dall’inventore tedesco Albert Hanson, che produsse un modello circuitale formato da un conduttore piano in alluminio posto su un substrato dielettrico.

Da allora i circuiti stampati ne hanno fatta di strada, ma negli ultimo 50 anni , dall’introduzione dei primi personal computer, si è vista una diffusione capillare in tutti i settori. Oggi fanno parte costantemente della vita quotidiana dalle penne usb che abbiamo sempre a disposizione, fino ad arrivare ad oggetti quotidiani come le lampadine a led.

I nostri addetti hanno visto buona parte di questa evoluzione , sia per quanto riguarda i circuiti sempre più complessi ed evoluti , sia per la componentistica installata sempre più miniaturizzata.

Un evoluzione cosi rapida e complessa, vista nella sua evoluzione, ci permette di selezionare i migliori fornitori per ogni tipologia di prodotto richiesta senza trascurare l’assemblaggio. Spesso diamo consigli ai nostri clienti per ottimizzare l’affidabilità e i costi.

Esse C.S. , il massimo dell’ attenzione nella consegna dei circuiti stampati.

ကျွန်ုပ်တို့ Company သည် ကုန်ပစ္စည်းများတင်သွင်းရာတွင် နိင်ငံတကာ စံချိန် စံညွှန်းနှင့်အညီ ထုတ်လုပ်သောကုန်ပစ္စည်းများကိုသာတင်သွင်းလျှက်ရှိပြီး၊ သုံးစွဲသူများ၏ လိုအပ်ချက်နှင့် ကိုက်ညီသောအရည်သွေးမီ ကုန်ပစ္စည်းထုတ်လုပ်မှုစနစ်နှင့် နည်းပညာအစဉ်တိုးတက်စေရန် သုတေသနပြုလုပ်ခြင်း၊ ပြန်လည်သုံးသပ်ခြင်း၊ တီထွင်ကြံစခြင်းတို့ကို ထုတ်လုပ်သူများနှင့်အစဉ်တစိုက် ညှိုနှိုင်းဆောင်ရွက်လျှက်ရှိပါသည်။
အကောင်းဆုံးကုန်ပစ္စည်းပေးသွင်းသူများကို ရွေးချယ်၍ ရေရှည်လက်တွဲလုပ်ဆောင်နိုင်ရန်အလေးထားဆောင်ရွက်လျှက်ရှိပါသည်။ကျွန်ုပ်တို့၏ သုံးစွဲသူများနှင့် ဝယ်ယူသူများသို့ အရည်သွေးပြည့်ဝသည့် ထုတ်ကုန်များကိုသာ သင့်တင့်မျှတသောဈေးနှုန်းများဖြင့် ဖြည့်ဆည်းပေးရန် ကြိုးစားလျှက်ရှိပါသည်။

Name: SILEO ELETTRONICA
Description:
La SILEO è un importatore/distributore di componenti elettronici specializzato nelle gamme dedicate ai settori industriali, automotive e cablaggi.
Ma non è tutto.
La nostra è un azienda fatta e gestita da persone che insieme, con pregi e difetti, si impegnano ad operare insieme con le loro competenze, il loro senso di responsabilità, la loro dedizione cercando tutti i giorni il raggiungimento degli obiettivi condivisi con i nostri clienti.
Fra tutti SImona Ciancio e LEO Moreni, soci fondatori della SILEO, ne sono il cuore 
Iniziato fin dal 1983 il loro cammino nel mercato della componentistica elettronica nel 1999 Simona e Leo decidono di fondare la SILEO.
La mission della nuova società è la ricerca ed importazione di prodotti ad alte prestazioni nel mondo delle connessioni con un ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo.
Rapidamente sviluppano la leadership nel mercato d'importazione grazie alla capacità di identificare le migliori case nel mercato asiatico delle connessioni.
Negli anni sono state via via ampliate le linee di articoli importati completando la gamma offerta anche con linee di componenti passivi, optoelettronici, morsettiere ecc.

I nostri punti di forza
•	Selezione accurata fra le marche asiatiche che si propongono sul mercato 
•	Test di valutazione della qualità del prodotto 
•	Verifica dell'affidabilità del produttore 
•	Gestione a stock con continui approvvigionamenti correttamente pianificati 
•	Poter offrire una vasta tipologia di componenti elettronici
•	Fare tesoro dell'esperienza dei nostri clienti. 
Questi sono i punti cardine che Simona e Leo hanno non solo attuato ma soprattutto trasmesso ai propri collaboratori e che vi offriamo con la nostra collaborazione.

Name: PHONEZO AZ LLC
Description: Wholesaling is the act of buying goods in bulk from a manufacturer at a discounted price and selling to a retailer for a higher price, for them to repackage and in turn resell in smaller quantities at an even higher price to consumers. Due to the large quantities purchased from the manufacturer at a discounted price, the wholesaler can also pass on this discount to retailers. The retailer sells at a price that reflects the overall cost of doing business.Most wholesalers do not manufacture the goods they sell but rather buy them from the source and concentrate on the business of sales and delivery to retailers. They are known as the intermediary in the supply chain. It is more cost-effective for a wholesaler to buy in bulk from a manufacturer and receive a discount than it would be to buy items individually.A wholesaler may specialize in a single product or product category or may offer a variety of goods. It can be anything from milk to electricity. Some wholesalers also broker deals between other wholesalers and retail businesses that require a variety of goods, or components of goods, that can be more efficiently obtained from a single source.A wholesaler should not be confused with an "official distributor" for a brand's product line. The wholesaler does not generally offer product support, may not be connected directly to the company from which it purchases products, and may even have limited familiarity with the products. Moreover, unlike distributors, many wholesalers sell competing products.Wholesaling is one step in the supply chain, which also includes suppliers of raw materials, manufacturers of finished goods, and retailers to end-users. Retailers purchase goods from wholesalers and then sell them at a high enough price to cover their costs and generate profits.

Name: TETA Company
Description:
TETA Company is a distributor and solutions provider of photovoltaic (PV) systems. Besides, as a merchandising company, we seek available high-tech equipment and solutions to empower the grid with smart grid technologies. The company offers various on-grid and off-grid solutions, including modules, inverters, batteries, mounting systems, and accessories, to PV professionals all over Iran.
Our business partners are installers, EPC contractors, resellers, wholesalers, distributors, and manufacturers in almost all PV markets. We stand for flexibility, individual and group approach, trustworthiness, and building on mutual trust and long-term cooperation. Our team members have more than ten years of PV experience in academic and industrial environments and are based in Tehran, Iran. Our team members are mainly from academia, and their interests revolve around the techno-economic analysis of multi-carrier microgrids incorporated with smart grid technologies, including distributed energy resources and demand response, as well as regulation to facilitate the development of resilient and emission-neutral microgrids (from land, to sea, and to space). What makes us different from our counterparts is that we have a solid R&D team analyzing the market for innovative solutions and products worldwide to stay up to date and pioneer. Our ultimate goal is to expedite microgrids developments enriched with renewables in pursuit of facilitating the energy transition through well-advised and pragmatic decision support by providing client feasibility studies, custom-tailored bankability studies, the balance of system (BOS) engineering analysis, and implementation management. Besides, we have the in-depth market knowledge and built a strong network over the years. We bring the latest smart technologies to the market through close collaboration with some of the world’s leading manufacturers.

Description:
Moon Radio grundades i Stockholm 1934.

Vårt namn kommer av att vi vid starten började med att tillverka det hetaste inom elektronik, nämligen radio.
Vår första modell såg dagens ljus i oktober 1934 och såldes till att börja med i våra lokaler i centrala Stockholm.
Radio har varit och är än i dag en bärande del av vår försäljning.
Vi säljer radio från bl.a
SANGEAN, vårt flaggskepp med allt inom radio. De har även det främsta utbudet av sk nödradio.
Roberts, en designikon parat med ljud i topp.
Vi har även ett fint utbud från Roadstar, skivspelare för entusiasten.

Men det finns mycket mer att upptäcka från Moon.
TV från AIWA, SHARP, FINLUX och BLAUPUNKT.
Mediaspelare och datorer från MINIX.
Retro hushållsmaskiner från ARIETE.
Miljöanpassade kablar o kontakter.

Har du för trångt på ditt eget lager?
Eller behöver du hyra ett kontorsrum?
Moon hyr ut lagerplatser på vårt lager med hög säkerhetsklass och lastbrygga med fällbar brygga.
Du kan även hyra kontorsrum på vårt kontorshotell.
Vårt lager och kontor ligger lättillgängligt, alldeles vid RV66, ca 2 mil från Västerås.

Tveka inte att höra av dig för en visning av våra tillgängliga platser och lokaler!
